name: Nova
description_html:
On a walk she will constantly check on you.... Or more accurately on your pouch of cookies. No leash manners cause she will very likely jump on you looking for love.

For such a small package, she has a surprisingly loud bark. Definitely still serves as an alarm system if needed. Might mislead burglers into thinking there is a Mastiff Great Dane Rottweiler mix inside.

name: Ziggy
description_html:
I zigged and I zagged and I managed to dodge whatever that was..I didn't quite see it but I'm so glad I didn't get run over. It was huge, did you see it? I was brought here for some rest and care and I lived, thank goodness, and here I am. These really kind people are now calling me Ziggy. I'm just about ready to be adopted too. Are you looking for a sweet and spicy guy like me? Yeah my eyesight isn't perfect but it's ok, so please help keep me safe in your care so big things don't chase me, or I don't have to chase them! I'm also heart worm negative and I'm ready to be neutered.

Can't wait to meet you.

Love, Ziggy

name: Sabo
description_html:
Sabo carries a large grin to match his large frame. He lived in the same home for all his years until a hardship made it difficult to care for him. He lived with his sister who is still awaiting intake. He's also lived with a 4 yr old child successfully. Sabo is described by his former owner as friendly to other dogs, and has never met cats. He has stayed indoors and is very house trained. He's stayed home alone typically for 4-8 hour stretches at a time, loose in the home with no troubles.

Being in a shelter is very foreign and quite shocking on the system. We would like to get him placed in a home right away. See his intro video on IG

He is RTG - Ready to Go - meaning he's neutered, vaccinated and meets all the qualifications to leave right away in adoption/foster/rescue opportunities. He's also heart worm negative. His advocates at Classic Canines are prepared to give assistance for a veterinary exam for a soft tissue mass on his left rear lower leg. Please reach out without further delay by visiting onsite or writing his advocates at caring@classiccanines.org

name: Jimmy
description_html: Jimmy is a friendly little guy who warms up to people quickly! He loves nose rubs and lap sitting with some fresh veggies (cilantro and parsley are his favorites). He doesn’t mind carefully supervised interaction with other pets and has done well around cats and dogs. He will make an easygoing companion for his forever home. Plus, he has the cutest white wig and big googly baby eyes!

name: Prissy
description_html:
A lovely & loving lady, so easy & gentle to be with. Meet her in person. You'll make her heart sing!

Prissy is RTG - READY TO GO -she's spayed, vaccinated, heart worm negative and knows a whole lot about good home living. You can help cut her shelter journey short by fostering or adopting her. She lived with a family for the last 4 years practicing all her good girl skills, staying home alone, house and crate trained, for 4-8 hrs. She's lived with a male dog friend. And she lived with a child. She's not as sure about cats but reserves the right to change her mind after studying them from a safe distance for awhile.

Her owner said: she loves soft beds and loves to relax. She loves watching squirrels and loves kids.

Prissy has the advocacy of her friends at Classic Canines who give extra support for the mature dogs. This lady is ready to slide right into a loving home again.

name: Princess
description_html:
Princess arrived with her best girl friend from home, Catrina, after their very elderly owner could no longer care for them. They spent a good deal of time outdoors yet appear to be very housetrained. Today we would like to get them to a safe indoors home with extra outdoor privileges that they will love.


Princess is adapting more slowly than her friend Catrina, who gives her nudges and asks her to have confidence, but steady progress is being made.See them together here


We are looking for the good deed do'er who's ready to help a couple of older ladies pass through the shelter to the next chapters of their life. Their advocates at Classic Canines are ready to provide the extra support needed. Check with staff or write us at caring@classiccanines.org

name: Catrina
description_html:
Catrina and her best friend Princess are in need of a new home after losing theirs. Catrina is the helper dog for Princess who is very shy. She nudges Princess along, telling her to come out of her bubble and meet people, when the world seems a little scary. The girls are a tag team and we would like for them to stay together. They've spent a lot of time outdoors but are very housetrained.


See them together here:


We are looking for the good deed do'er who's ready to help a couple of older ladies pass through the shelter to the next chapters of their life. Their advocates at Classic Canines are ready to provide the extra support needed. Check with staff or write us at caring@classiccanines.org

name: Earling
description_html: Earling is a super playful girl. She’s completely fine entertaining herself with her own toys, but she also loves hanging out with other animals. She’s super respectful around older cats and has done great living with a dog, so she’ll fit right into just about any home.

name: King
description_html:
Meet King, your tiny little old man who’s full of energy. He loves to follow his humans around. When he’s not up and about, he’s taking naps and enjoying his peanut butter-filled Kong. He hasn’t shown much interest in toys, so it’s unknown if he’ll ever play with anything.

He’s currently living with 4 kitties. They’re curious about each other, but they all keep their (short) distance and no aggression has been shown.

He sometimes gets excited or has too much water that he dribbles a little on the floor, so he usually has a washable wrap when indoors.

Don’t wait to give this King his forever home!

name: Baby Beethoven
description_html: Baby Beethoven was found struggling on the streets. He's embraced the luxury of three meals a day and friendship that he has received at the shelter. This baby boy loves pets all over and head scratches. He will follow you around to make sure you don't get lonely. Baby Beethoven is friendly and confident around other cats so may do well in a multi-cat home. You may have to go slowly with initial greetings, but it doesn't take long for him to warm up and if you have treats, he'll be your friend for life. This special boy is ready for a real home today!

name: Junie
description_html: Junie is a sweetheart. She has a limb difference so sometimes prefers to go tripod but still loves walks, sniffing, and chilling with you.

name: Mercy
description_html: Mercy is a sweet, happy pup waiting for a family. She is a great medium size, playful and affectionate.

name: Eva
description_html:
Eva is a young dog that is understandably nervous of the loud shelter environment. Go slow and at her pace, and she will warm up with tail wags and playful zooms. She enjoys sniffing and exploring.


Eva is a sweet girl that is shy and she just crave chest scratches then it all changed. She'll happily seat there for hours when the scratches get going.

She is determined and gave me the smart girl vibes. She seems very interested in going to meet doggy friends.

name: Xiao Mao
description_html: Itty bitty tuxedo cat with moon shoes. She followed me home in the neighborhood and now I am trying to find her a home~

name: Cheetos
description_html:
This girl loves three things: food, cuddles, and friends.


Her rescuer spotted her cute, but too boney butt, patiently using the crosswalk to cross busy Riverside, alone and tired.


Cheetos has been with us for two of the past four weeks, continuing to gain weight and getting cozy. She has been friendly from the start. While cautiously curious, she has warmed up to every stranger that she's met, but has been a bit overwhelmed by overly rambunctious young kids. In the end, she always chooses play...or cuddles. She likes chewing on sticks, trying to surprise the chickens, watching toads, chasing bugs, stealing food, earning treats, napping, and farting.


She happily sleeps through the night on a dog bed close to her people, but would much rather sleep curled up on someone's feet. Either way, she wants to be near you.


She's quiet, smart, and playful. While she may become more athletic as she gets her weight back, she's been a bit of a couch potato, with a few zoomies and bursts of play throughout the day. One good walk and she's ready for a nap, but we'll blame that on the heat. She's svelte and agile, there's got to be athlete in there!


She's highly food motivated and will eat whatever she can reach, but she has already learned to sit and politely wait before she eats. But she will eat it all as fast as possible, so we're using a puzzle bowl to slow her down.


We're still working on asking to go outside, not pulling on leash, nipping legs, and playing politely. So far she knows her name, Sit, Down, Off, No, Out, Outside, Use It, Stay, Toy, Up, and Come On. If you've got the treats or an enthusiastic word, she'll make the effort!


She's so social, but also so chill. A home where there's someone to regularly cuddle with and a soft bed to fart on is all she needs. A home with more than one person, more than one bed to fart on, and other pets to blame the farts on, she'll be in heaven.

name: Sandler
description_html:
Sandler is ready to leave the challenges of outdoor life behind and become someone’s beloved indoor cat.


We don’t know much about his past, but it’s clear he’s been through a lot. He arrived with abrasions around his nose, eyes, and mouth, a healing neck wound, and signs of insect hypersensitivity that make outdoor life especially difficult.


The best thing for Sandler is a safe, indoor home where he can stay comfortable and protected. He also developed an upper respiratory infection (URI) at the shelter and is recovering, but what he really needs is a calm place to heal.


Could that home be yours? Come meet Sandler today.

name: Chadwick
description_html:
Chadwick came to the shelter with his brother, Lenny, after their owner could no longer care for them. Lenny quickly found a home, but Chadwick is still waiting. After spending all four years of his life in a loving home, shelter life has been a big adjustment. Chadwick can be a little overwhelmed here, but who could blame him? He’s still learning to feel comfortable in a busy shelter environment.


According to his previous owner, Chadwick is a wonderful companion: a sweet lap cat who loves people, gets along with cats and dogs, and even enjoys playing with water! He just needs someone to see the loving cat he is and give him the chance to be himself again. Could that family be yours?

name: Espionage
description_html: Espionage and her sister Intrigue are looking for their forever home! Espionage is all black, but don't let her sneaky name and appearance fool you. She is very playful and good with other cats. (Not yet tested with dogs.) She loves to sleep on the cat tree, play with toys, and wrestle with her sister.

name: Winslow
description_html: This is a great dog. He is potty trained and very sweet. He knows fetch and is a really good companion dog. He does have a bit of separation anxiety. He is also great with other dogs. Not sure about cats though. If you adopt him you will be a very lucky owner.

name: Intrigue
description_html: Intrigue and her sister Espionage are looking for their forever home! True to her name, Intrigue finds everything intriguing and loves to explore. She is affectionate, playful, and has been good with the other cats in her foster home.

name: Zazzy
description_html: Zazzy would love to be your snuggle buddy! She's a lap cat who has lived well with other cats so may enjoy cat friends in her new home. Zazzy is the type of kitty to keep you company by hanging out wherever you are, chatting about your day or napping in your lap. She loves pets and play time in equal measure! Any attention you give her is appreciated. Her favorite snack is tuna, so stock up on the good stuff for this sweet girl. She's worth it!

name: Teddy
description_html: Teddy is the sweetest, calmest kitten ever. He loves to be close to you and would happily spend all day dozing on your lap! He uses a litterbox perfectly and enjoys playing with his brother Bear.

name: Percy
description_html:
Meet Percy!


Percy is a sweet, sensitive boy looking for a patient person who will let him settle in at his own pace. New places, loud noises, and lots of activity can feel overwhelming for him, but once he knows he's safe, his gentle personality begins to shine.


Percy does best when he's allowed to initiate interactions. When he comes over for affection, start with a few gentle scratches under his chin or neck. As his trust grows, he'll happily accept pets on his head and all over his body. Giving him the time and space to build confidence is the key to winning his heart.


He's housetrained and walks beautifully on a loose leash. Percy is curious about other dogs and enjoys observing them during walks. Because he can be easily startled, he'll benefit from a calm home and patient handling while he adjusts. Keeping a slip leash attached during his first few days at home is recommended to help ensure his safety as he settles in.


Percy may hesitate around doorways and thresholds, and loud noises can cause him to stop on walks. A calm voice and gentle encouragement are usually all he needs to feel reassured and continue on his way.


If you're looking for a quiet, loyal companion and are willing to let the friendship develop at Percy's pace, you'll be rewarded with a wonderful dog who just wants to feel safe and loved.

name: Strawberry Moon
description_html: Strawberry Moon was abandoned with her kittens in front of the shelter. She's a mild mannered, affectionate girl that is simply getting overlooked during kitten season. Strawberry Moon was immediately calm and friendly with us when she arrived. Now it's time for this retired momma cat to have a home of her own.

name: Wolff
description_html:
Meet Wolff! This handsome little guy came to the shelter with a litter of 5 siblings and is currently in foster care learning the ropes of indoor life with humans. He’s making steady progress every day but is still a shy kitten who isn’t quite sure people can be trusted.

Wolff is looking for a patient adopter who will let him build confidence at his own pace. With gentle handling, playtime, and a calm home, we think he’ll continue to blossom. Like any kitten, this guy loves to explore and play once he feels safe. Daily 1-on-1 time with a loving, patient human is all Wolff will need to grow into a wonderful companion! Interested in being his human bestie? Submit an adoption inquiry to be connected with his fosters!

name: Toto
description_html:
Meet Toto! This handsome little guy came to the shelter with a litter of 5 siblings and is currently in foster care learning the ropes of indoor life with humans. He’s made incredible progress from a scared, hissy kitty to a sweet boy who cries for attention and purrs as soon as he’s in your arms.

Toto is looking for an adopter who can offer him lots of scratches, cuddles, and playtime. Like any kitten, this guy looooves to play (feather duster toys are his favorite) and explore once he feels safe. With regular gentle handling and a calm home, we know he’ll continue to blossom into a confident companion. Interested in being his human bestie? Submit an adoption inquiry to be connected with his fosters!

name: Lady
description_html:
Lady is the sweetest and most gentle girl you will ever meet.


She walks nicely on the leash and loves sniffing around. But her favorite thing? Being glued to you.

Lady just wants to be loved and receive all the butt scratches and belly rubs you can provide.


Come meet Lady today and be enchanted by her charisma.

name: Irie
description_html:
Irie is a sweet, affectionate girl who loves pets and makes the cutest biscuits when she's happy. She can get a little overstimulated during long cuddle sessions, but she’s gentle about letting you know.


Like many cats in the shelter right now, Irie developed an upper respiratory infection (URI), but she’s almost finished with treatment and is back to her loving self.


All Irie wants is a home where she can play, relax, and soak up the attention she loves. Come meet this biscuit-making sweetheart today!

name: Carolina
description_html:
Sweet Carolina... good times never seemed so good!


Carolina arrived at the shelter after raising a litter of kittens, and now it's her turn to be loved and cared for. She was a little shy at first, but a few gentle head scritches bring out her sweet side. She'll roll over, make biscuits, and show you just how loving she can be.


Carolina is ready for a new chapter filled with cozy naps, affection, and a family to call her own.

name: Zivka
description_html:
Zivka is stinkin' adorable! She and several other cats arrived at AAS from the community, and she had some pelvic fractures. We moved her into a foster home for cage rest and supportive care. The fractures healed well with medical management, and she did not require surgery.

Zivka has returned to normal activity and doesn't appear to have any problems or lameness. She is playful, friendly, affectionate, and great with other cats.

I am a DHC, and I have my own webpage!

The adoption fee is waived for Zivka and ALL Desperate Housecats!

name: Benny
description_html:
Benny has recently been placed in foster care, so he's still settling in and getting comfortable in his new surroundings. He's also recovering from a mild cold, so he's feeling a little under the weather at the moment. He'll be fully healed and neutered soon, and it's still early days as his personality continues to blossom. More pictures to come!


Even now, Benny is an absolute love bug. He adores cuddles, has a loud, happy purr, and loves making biscuits. Once he's feeling his best, he'll make a wonderful comfort kitty. If you’re interested please reach out! He is currently paired with sister Buttons.

name: Button
description_html:
Buttons has just arrived in foster care, so she's still adjusting to her new surroundings while recovering from a mild cold but will be healed soon and then spayed. It's still early days, and as she begins to feel better and gain confidence, we're excited to see more of her personality shine. More pictures to come.


Right now, she's a little shy, but she's incredibly calm, gentle, and sweet. Even while she's not feeling her best, she's been so patient and trusting. It's clear she's a gentle soul who's just waiting to find the person she can truly call her own. If you’re interested please reach out. She is currently paired with brother Benny.

name: Brandy
description_html:
Brandy has been a very good dog staying in the overflow crate room while space is tight at the shelter. She gets out for 4 walks a day and is a nice walking dog on a leash and very pleasant to be with. She enjoys yard time and hamming it up with her new human friends.


She's a very good girl for veterinary handling procedures. She's in good condition with a beautiful coat of fur. She's vaccinated and heart worm negative and will be spayed before a final adoption.


Come meet this very lovely girl today.

name: Ranen
description_html:
Ranen is ready to transition from sewer cat to a life of couches!


He's chill, likes people a lot and has shown a tolerance of other cats and dogs. He lived for over a month in a backyard with another stray cat and daily interaction with a 60-lb pitbull without issues. He only reacted nervously when the other animal invaded his personal bubble but never hurt anyone. With proper introduction and integration, he could easily live with other pets. He would also make a great single pet to follow you around underfoot all day.


Ranen is not afraid to meow at you to grab your attention and gets very chatty whenever it’s dinner time. He is happiest playing with a wand toy at your feet and being close to you but still does his own thing. He dreams of being a couch kitty but would definitely enjoy his own catio set up to chitter at the birds.

name: Shayshay
description_html: Shay is an independent pup who lounges on her dog bed all day. She is pee pad trained and goes potty inside. She is a potential flight risk outside, so a fenced yard is important if you plan to potty train her outdoors. Loves cheese! 🧀

name: Zera
description_html:
Looking for a soft and easy friend? Zera had a very large hanging mass removed and she's recovering well. She's spayed, heart worm negative and otherwise healthy. She goes at her own speed, in her own way, the way she's learned to adjust her body over time with well worn hips. She's the sweetest lady who loves being with one person, or being with a crowd - she loves all dogs, big and small. She has a great grasp of verbals too.


She's house trained and loves to pick her laying spots at home. She'll need a single story arrangement but she can handle curbs and a few stairs.

She'll need help getting in and out of a vehicle.


If you would like a soft older friend and don't mind eventually giving a full ride for this sweet caboose that will someday lead into the train station, but it's not here, not today, not near, we would like to talk to you. Reach out to her advocates at caring@classiccanines.org or apply on her link.


TAKE A LOOK AT HER "BEFORE" SHELTER VIDEO so you can appreciate how far she's come to be here today.

name: Hinata
description_html: Meet Hinata! This gorgeous fluffy German Shepherd is ready to steal hearts and find her forever home. She is a dream on the leash, walking calmly and politely by your side. She already knows "sit" and loves praise. Give her a toy and watch her light up, she would love a family who'll keep the toy basket stocked. Smart, sweet, and eager to please, Hinata is looking for a home where she can keep learning new tricks and shower her people with loyalty. Could that home be yours? Come meet Hinata today and see her beautiful fluffy face in person!

name: Rosie
description_html:
Rosie is the biggest cuddle bug you'll ever meet and a total sucker for belly rubs. She gets along wonderfully with other dogs and kids (don't know about cats), making her a perfect fit for a busy, loving household.


She can be a little shy but her affectionate, gentle personality shines right through. Rosie is also crate trained, which makes settling into a new home that much easier. She is still working on her leash training but she is smart and eager to please.

name: Calypso (petco)
description_html:
Calypso is available for adoption at Petco Lakeline! Go there to meet her.


Calypso was found on shelter campus seeking attention and pets from a volunteer. We were able to easily get her into a carrier and bring her inside to safety. She's shy at first, but opens up quickly and loves to get gentle head and body pets. Calypso may do best in a low traffic home to suit her quiet kitty nature. She appreciates the simple things in life like a safe, calm space to relax, plenty of snacks and affection from people. She may do well in a home with other cat friends with proper introductions. Adopt Calypso today and truly make a pawsitive difference!

name: Zeus
description_html: Zeus is named after the king of the gods because he puts up with his four sisters with great stoicism and is a non discretionary player. He LOVES to be near and with people. He is super affectionate but will play with all of his siblings when he’s not loving on a person. He is the perfect companion- playful and cuddly. He likes to sleep wrapped up in the crook of arms or legs, so you would definitely be getting a cat who wants to sleep in your bed and purr you to sleep!

name: Athena
description_html: Athena has never met a toy she doesn’t like. She is the most active of her siblings, but still loves to cuddle in sleep. Like her namesake, she is inquisitive and loves to play with anything she can find. She will make an excellent companion for multiple pet homes and/or people who love to play with their cat.

name: Venus
description_html: Venus is named for the god of love because she is the most loving kitten I have ever met. (And I have fostered quite a few). While she enjoys playing and getting into shenanigans, her favorite pastime is being cuddled and petted. She wants to be with people all the time, so be ready for the most loving kitten! This is the first kitten I’ve fostered that made me feel like it would be hard to send her to another loving family. Choose Venus, and you will never be lonely or bored!

name: Reed
description_html:
This sweet boy was living in a community for many months and was brought to AAS because he was begging for food and losing weight. It is believed that his owners moved and left him behind. We don’t know much about him, although he has been very calm and friendly since his arrival.

Reed seems very social and used to being around humans, and he is a lap cat. All he really wants is three squares a day, some love, and a warm bed to sleep in at night, either through adoption or foster. He may be fine with other cats.

I am a DHC, and I have my own webpage!

The adoption fee is waived for Reed and ALL Desperate Housecats!

name: Diva
description_html: I’d love to go home with my sister, Elsa (snowflake) (28115) We love to play together! I’m a little higher energy than my sister BUT when it’s chill time, I love to snuggle with my human (see my pics), while my beautiful sis likes to find a soft blanket and sleep on her own (or with me). We are a perfect combo of beauty and personalities!

name: Elsa (Snowflake)
description_html: I’d love to go home with my sister, Diva (28113). We love to play together! She’s a little higher energy than me, but we balance each other out well. When it’s chill time I like to find a fuzzy blanket to sleep on my own or with my sister, But my sis loves to snuggle with her human companion. We are a perfect combo of beauty and personalities!

name: Summer
description_html: Summer loves a slow morning, sitting on the front porch with you while you drink your coffee. She is curious about every person she passes on a walk but likes to admire from afar. She hasn’t shown any reactivity to dogs on walks and enjoys the company of a canine companion at home. She would do well in a home with another calm dog. She is in the earliest stages of learning to use the restroom outside but it’s only been a week and has shown progress! She is also still learning to spend time in her crate. Summer needs a human that is patient with her because she warms up slowly. But once she feels comfortable her big personality shines and she is excited to spend every moment with her person. Feel free to message with any questions you have about Summer!

name: Maluke
description_html:
All About Me:

I've lived well with medium sized male and female dogs

I'm very house trained

I know some cues like sit and down

I'm not fussy at all about my food

I like a relaxed lifestyle with some atta'boys here and there because well..I'm a very good boy!


All About by Medical Status:

I'm a perfect size for me and I've been a very good boy for all my procedures.

I've had all my services completed and I'm healthy with a fresh dental. I'm feeling on the top of the world!


I come with full medical records from my people at ClassicCanines


Reach out on my link to speak with my foster

name: Rocky
description_html: He is very playful and loves to bunny hop around the place. He runs really fast then forgets to slow down and bonks his head on walls and boxes then proceeds to not learn and do the same thing again. He loves toys and playing with your hands. He’s pretty good with touching and has been well desensitized. He’s cool with: face, tail, booty, belly, ears, and paw touches. He’s learning to control the force of his bites/nibbles and is slowly getting better at just licking and little nibbles. Same goes for the force of claw strength he’s slowly figuring out how much force is not harmful toward others. He behaves well with two ten year olds but hasn’t interacted with anyone younger than that. Very very cuddly, will waddle up to you and plop beside to pass out. Also vocal! He has a very high pitched meow that he is not shy to use, he doesn’t scream, but he does just like to talk to you and they’re very cute quiet meows. He is an incredibly sweet little boy.

name: Bella
description_html:
Bella was one of the sweet, gentle Classic ladies who stayed in the crate overflow room, a prime location for fosters and adopters to meet a new dog in need of a home. She's now in a foster home ready to meet adopters.


She's very easy on a leash and very house trained. She likes to saunter through the doggie pool to cool down her paws on a hot day. She seems intrigued by squeaky toys. She is curious, sweet and just an all around wonderful pup! You can tell she just wants to be loved by her people. She likes getting pets, loves a good nap, likes being brushed and doesn’t mind a bath or blowout at all- she's been wonderful for both. She’s enjoys a good walk but also loves a good run in a backyard a little bit too! She’s a fun, well mannered pup who is just a joy to be around!


Click on her link to check in with her foster caregiver for questions and meeting up.

name: X Files
description_html: Sweet and playful boy who is ready to give all the love in the world to his person! He has the funniest little personality and loves to play with toys. He gets along great with other animals and would be a perfect companion to another cat or would love to be adopted with his sister Smoke.

name: Sirius
description_html:
When Sirius first arrived at the shelter, he was clearly unimpressed with our accommodations and service. But, since then he's come to see that we are trying our very best to make him feel welcome! And, in turn he has started giving us head butts and asking for pets every chance he gets.

This soft boy is very affectionate and also loves to play! His favorite toys are wand toys and mice he can chase around. And, don't forget the catnip because he has a bit of a problem.

Sirius is ready to run free in a home today!

I am a DHC, and I have my own webpage!

The adoption fee is waived for Sirius and ALL Desperate Housecats!

name: Benito
description_html:
Meet Benito ~ he's sure to charm you.

Did you know that older dogs know between 80-165 words? Benito's first language is Spanish, and English is quickly become his second language. Being in a shelter is already confusing for a dog, yet Benito is working on becoming bilingual.

Benito is a soft soul who works so nicely with staff and volunteers, enjoying his outings and all affections given. He's housetrained and great on a leash. He bonds nicely with the staff and volunteers who take care of him and pleasing them is important to him. Come meet him and see how you can be his VIP.

name: Botanicus
description_html:
Meet Botanicus, a gentle soul with a heart of gold who is looking for a quiet place to heal. Despite dealing with a rough skin condition that makes him look a bit scruffy right now, his sweet and loving personality shines through every single day. He does not let a little itchiness get in the way of being the best boy possible.

Botanicus is dog-friendly and loves the company of other pups, which might be just the comfort he needs while he gets better. He is looking for a temporary foster home where he can receive his medication, regular meals, and a cozy spot to rest his weary head. If you have some extra love and a corner of your home to spare, Botanicus will pay you back in endless gratitude and gentle tail wags.

name: Ray
description_html:
Some dogs wear their hearts on their sleeves, while others just need a little time. This sweet boy is still settling into shelter life and can be a bit shy, especially around the noise of barking dogs. When he's feeling unsure, he'll happily walk close behind his person, looking to them for reassurance.


Once he's away from the kennel environment, his personality starts to shine. He enjoys leisurely walks, taking time to sniff and explore, and checks in with his handler often. He's housetrained, walks nicely on a loose leash, and politely ignores both people and other dogs while out and about.


Toys aren't usually his thing—but hand him a shark stuffie and you'll see the cutest side of him! Watching him toss it into the air and catch it himself is guaranteed to make you smile. It's clear he's beginning to relax and come out of his shell a little more every day.


This gentle, medium-energy boy would thrive with a patient adopter who will let him settle in at his own pace. Give him a little time, a quiet place to decompress, and maybe a shark toy of his own, and you'll get to watch his confidence grow into something truly special.

name: Melvin
description_html:
Meet Melvin! This handsome 2-year-old boy is equal parts explorer and cuddlebug. On walks, Melvin enjoys taking his time to meander, sniff all the interesting smells, and happily say hello to new people along the way. He loves puzzle toys, outdoor adventures, and anything that keeps his curious mind busy.


Melvin is silly, sweet, affectionate, and very treat motivated, which makes bonding with him extra fun. One of his favorite things in the world? Butt scratches! They’re the quickest way to earn his happy wiggles. He’s also dog friendly and would enjoy having canine pals to hang out with.


If you’re looking for a lovable companion with a gentle spirit, playful personality, and lots of love to give, Melvin may be your perfect match!

name: Knox
description_html:
Knox is a very happy-go-lucky boy who was found on the streets wearing a green harness and dragging a green leash. We wish we knew his story. He stayed two months with a foster finder. while awaiting an intake appointment. He didn't live with other animals during that time. He stayed home alone 9-12 hours free roaming without ever causing any troubles.

Knox has been staying in the crate room at the shelter and frankly he's pretty over that arrangement. He's not a fan lately of returning to his crate. We can't blame him. It's not comfortable to stay in 24 hrs a day. And Knox likes his precious sleep - at about 8pm he simply reserves the right to rest and not have to get up and go out.

Knox had a fresh bath on 6/13 and his coat is so gorgeous and silky black. We would love to get him back into a cool and comfy home ASAP. See his intro video here

Are you ready to help Knox? Come in person between 11-6.

Offsite questions? Reach out to his advocates at caring@classiccanines.org

name: Portia
description_html:
Portia is an easygoing, big, beautiful girl with a stunning brindle coat that is sure to turn heads wherever she goes. This gorgeous pup is the ultimate package, bringing the perfect balance of affection and playfulness to every single day. Whether you are looking for a fun-loving partner for backyard games or a sweet companion to cuddle up with on the couch, Portia fits the bill perfectly.

Not only is she incredibly charming, but she is also a smart cookie who already knows how to "shake" hands to introduce herself. Portia is ready to bring her bright spirit and endless affection to a forever home. Meet this wonderful girl today—she’s waiting to show you her favorite trick!

name: Tuxedo
description_html:
We love the style of Dr Tuxedo ~ sweet, gentle and easy - and such a people lover! He's been great for all of his vet handling procedures and a total sweetheart with the volunteers. He always carries a smile and he carries his people gently on the other end of the leash too! He casts his Dr spell on people and makes them swoon... .


He's heart worm negative and just had his immune system bolstered against doggie colds. Next up he'll be neutered before, or as part of, an adoption.


He's still new to shelter life and hasn't been play group rated yet. Speak with staff about arranging a doggie meetup if you have a resident pupper.

name: Kiwi
description_html: Kiwi was an outdoor kitty in a rural area who ended up at the shelter when her caregiver passed away. She's knows the kindness of strangers and appreciates a soft approach. She loves the company of other cats and should go to a home with cat friends to help her ease into a new space. Kiwi could especially benefit from having a confident, social cat to model brave behaviors for her. She would do well in a low traffic home without small children; someplace she can come out of her shell at her own pace. Kiwi is a Cactus Cat for her extreme shyness so she needs a cat savvy adopter to help her on the next leg of her journey.

name: Mahoney
description_html:
Mahoney's life long owner was no longer able to care for her, which left her in the care of the animal shelter at nearly 13 yrs old. She's lived in an apartment and went on leash walks daily but did not get them often enough due to her owner's conditions.

She's described as a cuddly companion and she knows some cues like come and sit.

She's not lived with other pets during her lifetime but that doesn't mean she's averse to them. Her owner said she's pretty neutral toward dogs and cats. You can schedule a doggie meet up at the shelter after meeting Mahoney. For cats, slow intros are recommended. She has no known experience with children.

Mahoney favors wet food over dry and sure would appreciate a comfy space to call her own outside of the shelter.

name: Oakley
description_html:
Oakley is a 6-year-old pup who's the perfect size for all of life's adventures, whether that's a road trip, a neighborhood stroll, or relaxing at home. It’s impossible not to love his expressive ears and soft fur.


Oakley’s ideal day would be full of chew toys and soaking up the sunshine on the patio. He's just as happy enjoying a quiet afternoon by your side as he is heading out to explore.


Oakley is a wonderful housemate. He's potty trained, crate trained, and walks well on a leash. He enjoys the company of other doggy friends after proper introduction and has an easygoing personality. Even during a busy family dinner with kids running around, Oakley settled in quietly and took it all in stride.


Oakley can be a little startled by loud noises such as the garbage truck and hesitant of strangers entering the house, but with reassurance he continues to build confidence. He is very food motivated which makes training sessions with him easy. Currently, he knows the commands ‘sit’ and ‘crate time’ but is catching on quickly to others.


If you're looking for a sweet, well-mannered companion who's ready to be your best adventure buddy and your favorite patio lounging partner, Oakley could be your perfect match!

name: Charming (Petco)
description_html:
Charming is available for adoption at Petco Lakeline! Go there to meet him today.


Prepare to be charmed! Just like his name suggests, this boy will make you swoon. He's affectionate, and easy going, and it's always snuggle time if you allow it. Charming is looking for a little luxury in his life. He's had it tough outdoors for awhile, but he'd much prefer the security of a caring home. Don't let this endearing boy, with his soft chirps and his tongue that sometimes pops out, be the one that got away. Adopt Charming today!

name: Blue Moon
description_html:
I’m Blue Moon!


I may be a tad bit shy at first, but we will become besties really soon!


  • I’m very housetrained
  • I know “sit”, “down”, “stay”, and “come”
  • I walk well on leash
  • I love to do a little cuddling
  • I am a blast!


Come meet me today!

name: Oliver
description_html:
Oliver is the kind of dog who quietly works his way into your heart. He's been a favorite of mine since he first arrived at the shelter, and it's been so rewarding to watch his confidence grow with every outing.

If there's one way to win Oliver over, it's with a toy! Fetch is his absolute favorite game, and toys are definitely his love language. He happily brings them back without being grabby, and he loves carrying one along on walks like his own little comfort stuffie. While treats aren't a huge motivator for him, toss him a ball and you've got his full attention.

Oliver is very housetrained, walks nicely on a loose leash with only mild pulling, and enjoys taking his time to sniff and explore while checking in often with his person. He's neutral around other dogs and people, making him an easy companion for adventures. He even seems happy to coexist with other dogs rather than feeling the need to be the center of attention.

Oliver can be a little shy when meeting new people, so he appreciates a patient, go-slow introduction. Once he knows you, though, he's eager to head out for fun. He's an independent guy who doesn't demand constant affection, but he'll happily share his love through games of fetch and quiet companionship.

If you're looking for a playful, housetrained, toy-loving buddy who will happily carry his favorite toy wherever life takes him, Oliver just might be your perfect match.

name: Isabelly
description_html:
This little one took a few days to find her confidence, but once she did, her personality came shining through! At just a couple months old, she's already proven she can hold her own against our resident 9-month-old kitten, the two of them tear around the room like they've been best friends forever. When she finally wears her big foster brother out, she's perfectly happy entertaining herself with toys on her own.


She warmed up to her human foster family right on schedule, and now she's all about the cuddles. Curling up on laps and settling into arms like she owns the place. Sweet, playful, independent, and affectionate, she truly has it all.


She would thrive in a home with another cat to keep her busy, but she's confident and self-sufficient enough to shine as an only pet too. If you're looking for a kitten with a big personality in a tiny package, she just might be your perfect match!

name: Gumbo
description_html:
Meet Gumbo 🥘 — a big-hearted, affectionate guy who is ready to trade shelter life for a comfy couch. His previous family described him as "the most loving and affectionate" dog and shared that they had to surrender him only because they could no longer keep him where they lived. They reported that he was house-trained, friendly with people, and happiest spending time with his family.

While shelter life has been tough on Gumbo, volunteers consistently see a different dog once he's out of the kennel. He enjoys sniffy walks, kiddie pool time, treats, pets, and relaxing in the AC. One volunteer even brought him to a meeting, where he politely greeted everyone, settled in, and spent most of the time snoozing. He's easy to handle, enjoys affection, and has earned a reputation as a total sweetheart.

If you’re looking for a loyal companion who loves people, enjoys the simple things in life, and is happiest close to his humans, Gumbo may be the perfect recipe. ❤️

name: Pepper
description_html:
Pepper isn't spicy at all! She's a soft natured, affectionate lady of wisdom who misses the comforts of home. She loves when people talk to her and give her pets and cuddles.

Pepper is very house trained and a pro at staying home alone with her squeaky toy friends. She's an expert car rider too. She's lived with dogs before and shared kennel space with a dog at the shelter.


Pepper is a healthy lady, heart worm negative, vaccinated and spayed and ready to leave right away for adoption and foster opportunities. She can't wait to meet you and get back to cozy home living.


Meet her onsite or reach out to her advocates at caring@classiccanines.org with questions.

name: Mulch
description_html:
Meet Mulch! He is the cutest kitten in the world. He’s very well socialized to both people and dogs and loves to be around both. You won’t find Mulch hiding away under the bed, he wants to share in the fun and the love. He’s not even afraid of loud noises like vacuums. He’s also been great with our Lab. Mulch will snuggle with our dog, play with him, and even sleep curled up on our dog, it’s adorable.


He’s a very active cat and needs a lot of playtime so a good match would be someone who loves interacting with and playing with their cat(s), he’s not a great match for someone who is hands off.


Since he was a single foster, he is currently still working on not biting hands and feet (or any skin) so you will need to be patient with him and always correct it by simply giving him a toy so he learns that its not ok.


He has absolutely no fear when it comes to dogs so make sure to do slow introductions (perhaps Mulch or the dog in a crate so the other can smell them). Make sure your dog is tolerant of cats wanting to play with them and doesn’t mind the occasional nibble as Mulch loves to play and he’s full speed ahead.


Overall, you’ll find Mulch to be very kind and cuddly, curious and playful, and such a sweetie. If you love a cat who has a bit of that “dog personality”, Mulch would be a great fit for you.

name: Tinkerbell
description_html: Tinkerbell is a perfectly balanced kitten- equal parts playful and sweet. Affectionate, a little vocal, playful and cuddly. She loves food and gets along great with other animals. When she’s not chasing down a mouse toy she loves to cuddle up with her people and purr the day away.

name: Smoke
description_html: Professional biscuit maker and purr box who loves to cuddle and snuggle up! She loves to be held and will follow her people around everywhere they go. Very sweet girl with a funny and playful side, she would be happiest with lots of attention and love.

name: Perla
description_html: Perla is such a lovely dog, and it's rare we get rotties at the shelter. She's playful, cuddly, knows sit, and loves to be petted. She's also very smart and great with puzzle toys. Perla is dog social and would fit into many types of homes due to her mellowness. She's a really good girl. Perla is also small for a rottie so she may be a mixed breed. Come see her today!

name: Nyla
description_html:
Nyla's beautiful brindle coat and sweet puppy dog eyes will melt your soul. Despite being shy at first, her brows can quickly unfurrow with some love and pets showing her extremely sweet personality. She appears to be house-trained, well-mannered on leashed walks and does well with other dogs- she is even paired at the shelter and participates in the shelter's playgroup with multiple dogs at one time. Come meet Nyla today or if you have a resident dog, schedule a meet and greet to see if welcoming Nyla home would be a good fit!

Nyla is a graduate of our Enduring Service program! To learn more about this program, read about it on our website. According to her Enduring Service program handlers Nyla is the epitome of chill; always quiet, laid back and clam. She is friendly with both people and dogs. So, loving and also enjoys being loved on in return. She knows commands like sit, paw and low. Nyla is also crate-trained and has great leash manners. She loves bath time, will just stand still letting you wash her. Nyla would be the perfect pet for any animal lover!

name: Annie
description_html: Meet Annie, the World's Cutest House Panther! Annie was found in May hiding in a car engine after a night of storms, just one pound & very scared!  She has spent a few weeks growing in size & confidence in foster care & is ready for her own furrever family. Annie is a true house panther, always active & exploring, snuggling with her people when she is worn out. Annie likes other kitties & will do best with another playful kitten or cat.

name: Amor
description_html:
Amor is a sweetheart ❤️. She is housetrained, strolls along easily on leash and calmly passes other dogs. She enjoys roaming around the playyard and rolling in the grass. Amor is treat motivated and promptly sits on command. She is affectionate and mellow but does show curious interest in pesky squirrels 🐿️.


Amor is a sweet lady who deserves to chill and live an easy life. She's very calm and enjoys spending time outdoors along with indoor home comforts.


Amor is a wonderful companion ready for her forever home. Come meet this special girl!

name: Niomi (petco)
description_html:
Niomi is available for adoption at Petco Lakeline! Go there to meet her.


Niomi is a retired momma cat! She decided to have her kittens on a nice person's patio and they cared for her while she nursed her babies. Now her kittens are off living their dreams while Niomi is still searching for her home. This is a recurring theme in the life of many young female cats. Niomi is very outgoing, confident, affectionate and loves pets. She can be playful and enjoys space to romp around. Niomi may do best in a home where she can be the #1 diva and get your full attention. Adopt this special lady today!

name: Sugar
description_html:
Meet Sugar!

This pup has the most adorable ears and beautiful eyes! 


She is a young, medium-sized vibrant and friendly gal! Sugar is crate trained and excelling at basic manners training. She enjoys car rides and is completely unbothered by thunderstorms. Sugar is well mannered on leash walks and is great with dogs and cats!


The girl loves a stick! Her joyful and playful energy is uplifting. Sugar has an excellent demeanor! She is a great blend of sweet, curious, smart & goofy.

Sugar was found as a stray. Traffic noises are scary to her, but she is courageously working through her concerns in foster care.


If you'd like to learn more about Sugar, please click "Get Started!"

name: Brock
description_html: Brock has a very sweet, soft meow that lets you know when he is hungry or wants attention. He is also litter box trained, eats a mix of crunchy and wet food, neutered, microchipped, vaccinated, and ready to be your favorite side kick.

name: Taz
description_html:
Meet Taz!


Taz is a lovable, happy-go-lucky young pup who is ready to find his forever family! At just over a year old, this handsome boy is full of energy, affection, and enthusiasm for life. His favorite things include long walks, chewing on his favorite bones, and soaking up attention from the people he loves.


Taz is a friendly, social dog who enjoys meeting new people and has done well with both men and women. He’s lived with a young infant and is described as loving and sweet. One of his favorite ways to show affection is by giving hugs, and he’s always excited to be close to his people.


This smart boy already knows several commands, including sit, stay, and shake. He also has excellent mealtime manners—he can patiently wait for permission before eating until he hears his release cue. Taz is house-trained and crate-trained.


Taz enjoys playing with other dogs. He’s friendly when approached by strangers on walks and generally loves being part of the action.


Thunderstorms and fireworks can make Taz nervous, and car rides aren’t his favorite activity, but with patience and reassurance he settles back in. Because he’s still a young, energetic dog, he’ll thrive with a family that can provide regular exercise and plenty of love.


Taz’s family is making the difficult decision to rehome him due to military housing breed restrictions, not because of any fault of his own. They describe him as very loving, playful, happy, sweet, and devoted.


If you’re looking for a loyal companion who loves hugs, adventures, and being part of the family, Taz may be the perfect match for you!

name: Annabelle
description_html:
I'm Annabelle.... I love being with everyone, big and little, humans and dogs, and especially puppies - I love their energy. I love to take walks too.

I'm the perfect companion! I'm affectionate and I love to be petted around the ears! Here I am with my friends here.

Now I'm in a foster home. I'm so patient for bathing and easy to care for. I'm housetrained and so much fun. I'll keep up with the rest of your crew too. I have a clean bill of health too! I hope you believe in me cuz I believe in you! And I can tickle your funny bone too.

Click on my link to meet me.

Love, Annabelle

name: Cassia
description_html:
Cassia is a beautiful, sweet, and shy girl. She arrived at AAS after being rescued from a community environment. Upon arrival, the DVM noticed that she has chronic but stable eye conditions, which are likely the result of previous URI and ulcerated corneas. Her right eye remains dilated and her left eye has collapsed a bit. No treatment is required at this time, and her eyes are not painful. They should be monitored for any sudden changes as there is the potential for glaucoma to develop.

As a member of our Cactus Cats program, Cassia is becoming more comfortable with people. She tends to hide, but likes to be petted. She is not aggressive, she’s just learning to appreciate everything that humans are good for.

Cassia will do best in a home with a cat buddy. She was friends with Bee in their foster home.

I am a DHC, and I have my own webpage!

The adoption fee is waived for Cassia and ALL Desperate Housecats/Cactus Cats!

name: Piggy
description_html:
Piggy is the total package—sweet, silly, playful, and guaranteed to keep you smiling. With his giant expressive ears and happy personality, it's hard not to fall in love with him!


This happy boy is a dream to take out and about. He's a loose leash walker, rides politely in the car, and stays calm around just about everything. On his day out, he happily ignored other dogs, adults, children, squirrels, and even ducks, preferring to spend his time sniffing and exploring.


Piggy loved meeting new people and greeted everyone with a wagging tail and playful bows, soaking up all the pets. Once back at the house, he spent hours happily playing with toys—his absolute favorite! Whether you want to play tug or toss a toy, or let him entertain himself, Piggy is always ready for fun. He's also very treat-motivated, making him eager to learn.


He appears to be housetrained, had no accidents, and didn't try to get into anything he shouldn't. If you're looking for a goofy, easygoing companion who loves adventures, toys, and making people laugh, Piggy is ready to be your new best friend.

name: Bruno
description_html:
Bruno is a happy, wiggly boy who's always ready for his next adventure! He has great leash manners and enjoys checking in with his person throughout walks, making him a fun and engaging companion. While he may occasionally get excited by squirrels or become a little jumpy in new situations, he's easily redirected with a few treat tosses and quickly gets back on track.


Smart, athletic, and highly treat motivated, Bruno would likely love learning new tricks or even trying agility. His playful personality shines through, and he enjoys meeting people and other dogs with friendly curiosity. He also loves being brushed and has a cuddly side once it's time to relax.


Bruno is looking for an active home that will enjoy exploring the world with him, continue his positive training, and appreciate his sweet, eager-to-please personality. If you're searching for a playful best friend with brains, heart, and lots of potential, Bruno is ready to meet you!

name: Diamond
description_html:
Meet Diamond!

Diamond is a sweet, gentle girl with a heart as precious as her name. After spending more than two years in a loving home, she is looking for a new family through no fault of her own after her owner had to move and was unable to take her along.


This friendly pup has lived successfully in an apartment and is both house-trained and paper-trained, with no history of accidents in the home. She has wonderful indoor manners, making her an easy companion to have around the house.

When left alone, Diamond can be trusted to relax freely in the home and has not shown any destructive behaviors.


Diamond's favorite activities include playing fetch, chasing toys, chewing on bones, and carrying around her beloved squeaky toys. She also knows several commands, including sit, stay, come, and shake, and enjoys spending quality time with her people.


Those who know Diamond describe her as incredibly sweet and friendly. She has done well with children and has a calm, gentle nature. While she can be shy around men and may take some time to warm up to unfamiliar people, patience and kindness help her build confidence. She may bark when someone new enters the home and can be a little nervous when approached by strangers on walks, but she has never shown any aggression.


Diamond is also cooperative with handling, allowing baths, nail trims, and being picked up, although she can be a little nervous during bath time. Loud noises and vacuums can be scary for her, so she appreciates a family that understands her sensitive side and can help her feel safe and secure.


She would thrive in a patient, loving home that can give her the time and companionship she deserves. If you're looking for a loyal, gentle companion who enjoys playtime, quiet evenings, and being close to her family, Diamond may be the perfect match for you.


Come meet Diamond and discover what a gem she truly is!

name: Shadow
description_html:
Stormy and Shadow have been together their entire lives. They were adopted as kittens, but were surrendered to AAS because of allergies in the family. Their owner described them as friendly, cuddly lap cats. Stormy REALLY loves laps (especially if you are a man 😊). Shadow is easily held, and loves to be petted.

Because Stormy and Shadow start out a little shy, they are members of our Cactus Cats program. As they are gaining confidence, they are becoming more and more delightful to be around.

We would LOVE to see Stormy and Shadow out of the shelter, either through adoption or foster.

We are a bonded pair of DHCs, and we have our own webpage!

The adoption fee is waived for Stormy, Shadow, and ALL Desperate Housecats!

name: Stormy
description_html:
Stormy and Shadow have been together their entire lives. They were adopted as kittens, but were surrendered to AAS because of allergies in the family. Their owner described them as friendly, cuddly lap cats. Stormy REALLY loves laps (especially if you are a man 😊). Shadow is easily held, and loves to be petted.

Because Stormy and Shadow start out a little shy, they are members of our Cactus Cats program. As they are gaining confidence, they are becoming more and more delightful to be around.

We would LOVE to see Stormy and Shadow out of the shelter, either through adoption or foster.

We are a bonded pair of DHCs, and we have our own webpage!

The adoption fee is waived for Stormy, Shadow, and ALL Desperate Housecats!

name: Princesa
description_html:
Meet Princesa ~ life tossed her a curve ball when she lost her longtime home due to her owner's hardship, marking the start of a major transition in life.

Princesa is affectionate, house trained, crate trained and walks nicely on a leash. She loves taking walks. She has lived with a male dog about the same size as her for part of her life and shared a kennel at the shelter with a male dog See them together in their kennel here . She's now in a foster home with another dog. She co-exists nicely and respectfully.

She's spayed, vaccinated, heart worm negative. She checks all the boxes of an easy care friend for your home, just click on her inquiry link to check in with her foster provider directly.

She's advocated for by her friends at ClassicCaninesATX who give an extra level of care and support for the mature dogs that are often the most rounded choices for so many homes.

name: Mariah
description_html: Mariah is a super shy young girl who was being cared for in the community. She was initially shy and friendly for pets in the shelter, but the stress is now getting to her. She is likely to hiss initially and need a slow start. You can make friends with her through Churu! Mariah will need a patient foster or adopter with a starter space with appropriate hiding spots for this timid girl. We can’t wait to see her blossom in a home and get braver every day!

name: Charlotte
description_html:
Charlotte needs a quiet place to heal. When she arrived at the shelter, she was underweight, had a healing wound, wasn’t grooming herself, and was battling an upper respiratory infection (URI). After treatment, her symptoms returned, and she’s back in our care area. Shelter life can be stressful for cats recovering from illness, and Charlotte would love a calm home where she can rest and recover.


The person who found her said she is very friendly, and she has been sweet with our veterinary staff as well. Charlotte is ready for a fresh start and is available for foster or adoption.

Can you help Charlotte get the loving home she deserves?

name: Swizzy
description_html:
Swizzy has come a long way since arriving at the shelter with his five littermates. Though he was a little spicy at first, he cooperated with our veterinary team and made it through treatment for an upper respiratory infection. Now healthy, he’s ready for a family of his own!


Swizzy is still shy with new people, but he is very curious. And this boy loves to play, especially wrestling with his siblings, Thrillnerd and Adam, before curling up with them in an adorable kitten cuddle puddle.


Swizzy is growing up at the shelter instead of in a loving home where he can play, explore, and continue building confidence. He deserves the chance to blossom into the happy cat he’s meant to be. He'd love to go home with one of his littermates or have another kitty friend at home.

name: Lalita
description_html: This sweet, shy girl warms up fast. She loves cuddles and pets and being with you.

name: Honey Bee
description_html:
Honey Bee is shy when first meeting new people, but she soon decides you are friends and that is where the fun begins!

Honey Bee is hilarious, zooming around a play yard while smacking her own face with a toy. She loves the kiddie pools especially in the Texas heat! Once she burns off a little energy she’s more than content to just come lay down by her human friends and hang out, occasionally asking for a few pets.

Honey Bee is constantly exploring and smelling for new things. Like a real little bumble bee, Honey Bee goes from tree to tree, grass patch to grass patch and sniffs all of the messages the world has to offer. This is her favorite - the walkies.

Honey Bee seems very house trained and is ready to find a forever family!

We'd love to learn more about her in foster care, or find her a forever home!

name: Cassandra
description_html: Miss Cassie is the sweetest cuddliest floppiest little kitty in the world, she loves to play and then cuddle up with you when she's all tired out!

name: Bug
description_html: Bug is a big softie. He is a great energy and lovable vibe. He is smart and already knows sit, lay down, shake, and roll over. He looks at you with those soulful eyes. He loves pets and scratches and kisses. While he is a big boy, for sure, he would make either a perfect big or little spoon as you snuggle.

name: Nevis
description_html:
Meet Nevis — a sweet, snuggly little gentleman who has been loved since day one.


Nevis was born to Salem, our beloved backyard community cat who has been part of our lives for the past three years. We have cared for Nevis since the very day he was born, so he has grown up knowing people, affection, and the good life. He is gentle, playful, cuddly, and has the kind of personality that makes everyone fall in love with him.


Nevis is fully litter box trained, great with humans, and loves attention. He is the perfect mix of sweet couch companion and playful little goofball. He will happily curl up for cuddles, but he also has a very serious athletic career chasing laser pointers, pouncing on toys, and showing off his kitten-level zoomies.


He is fixed, vaccinated, and ready for his forever home. Nevis would make a wonderful addition to a loving household looking for a cat who is affectionate, gentle, playful, and already very used to being cared for by people.


Nevis has been raised with so much love, and now he is ready to bring that love into his permanent home.

name: B.B.
description_html:
Meet BB — the curious, confident little explorer of the litter.


BB was born to Salem, our beloved backyard community cat, and we have cared for him since the very day he was born. From the start, BB has had a spark about him. He is adventurous, observant, and always the first to investigate something new. He looks at you with these knowing little eyes, like he fully understands what is going on and has a few opinions about it.


BB is sweet, gentle, litter box trained, and very comfortable with people. He has a playful, leader-of-the-pack personality and loves trying new things, exploring his surroundings, and being part of whatever is happening. He is also a little talkative and will happily “talk back” when you speak to him, which makes him feel more like a tiny roommate than just a cat.


He is one of those kittens who is impossible not to get attached to. BB King has been one of our favorites in the litter because he has so much personality, confidence, and charm. He is fixed, vaccinated, and ready for his forever home.


BB deserves a wonderful home where he can be loved, spoiled, explored with, and appreciated for the special little cat he is.

name: 26902- pico short for pico de gallo
description_html:
Meet Pico (short for Pico de Gallo)! 🌶️🐾


Just like her namesake, Pico brings a little extra spice to every day! She’s an adventurous, curious kitten who’s always ready to explore, whether that’s investigating a new toy or supervising whatever her humans are up to. Cooking dinner? Folding laundry? Working at your desk? Expect Pico to be right there, keeping you company every step of the way.


When she’s done exploring, she’s all about the cuddles. Pico is a certified purring machine who absolutely melts for pets and affection. She’s also quite the conversationalist—talk to her, and don’t be surprised if she chirps or meows right back!

Among her foster siblings, Pico has always been the natural-born leader. She’s confident, clever, and isn’t afraid to be the first to check out something new, making her an entertaining and loving companion.


Highlights:

  • Adventurous, curious, and always ready to explore.
  • Loves to cuddle and is a nonstop purring machine.
  • Enjoys pets and happily soaks up attention.
  • Your little shadow who loves keeping you company while you cook, clean, or work.
  • Chatty and interactive—she’ll often “talk” back when you speak to her.
  • Smart, confident, and a natural leader among her foster siblings.
  • Gets along well with her foster kitten siblings.


If you’re looking for a kitten with a big personality, endless affection, and a knack for making everyday moments more fun, Pico is ready to spice up your life! 🌮🐾

name: 26901 - torts short for tortoiseshell
description_html:
Meet Torta (short for Tortoise)! 🎭🐾

Named for her gorgeous tortoiseshell coat, Torta is a little work of art. Her beautiful markings are truly one of a kind, and the pattern on her face always reminds us of The Phantom of the Opera—giving her an elegant, mysterious look that’s impossible to forget.


While she may not be the loudest kitten in the room, Torta has a quiet charm that wins hearts. She’s a gentle, lovable girl who enjoys affection and has a calm, sweet presence. One of her favorite things is spending time with her sister, Pico—they make an adorable duo and love each other’s company.


Torta is the kind of kitten who doesn’t need to be the center of attention to steal the show. Her gentle nature and striking beauty speak for themselves.


Highlights:

  • Stunning tortoiseshell coat with unique, one-of-a-kind markings.
  • Her face resembles The Phantom of the Opera, giving her an unforgettable look.
  • Quiet, gentle, and incredibly lovable.
  • Enjoys affection and being near her people.
  • Shares a special bond with her sister, Pico, and loves feline companionship.
  • A calm, sweet companion who will make any house feel like home.


If you’re looking for a kitten with timeless beauty, a gentle heart, and a quiet way of making you smile, Torta is ready to find her forever family.

name: Tyson
description_html: Tyson is great on a leash and loves a walk! He loves to give cuddles at any time. He loves toys and knows "sit" and "stay" in Spanish. He's very friendly and affectionate! Very good boy.

name: Penny
description_html:
Penny is a boss lady who knows what she wants! And she wants out of this kennel. She also wants to be your only special feline and get all your attention. Penny is a happy girl when she has her special someone to follow around. She loves to watch you cook and go about your daily tasks (aka make sure you're doing it right). This smart girl knows her name and responds to little "kissy" sounds.

Penny is unimpressed with our service here at the shelter, so she may not show you her best side in a kennel. We'd love to see her in a foster home if she doesn't get adopted ASAP!

I am a DHC, and I have my own webpage!

The adoption fee is waived for Penny and ALL Desperate Housecats!

name: Opal
description_html:
Hi, I'm Opal!


I arrived to the shelter needing a helping hand and a place to stay for a fresh start in life. I'm in a great foster home now where I found other fur friends, small and big, and we like to kick up together, and lay down together. I love having friends.


Don't let anyone tell you my age is a barrier - I'm here to prove my spirit and will, I have a lot of life left to give. I'm a joyful lady. You know what else? I'm a healthy lady too. My people say I qualify for a little nip and tuck of my girly parts and then I'll be ready for 'doption. That means I could be coming your way soon.


See my short introduction video here in the shelter before my big makeover. Now I feel so liberated. I'm nice and cool for the summer weather.


See you soon?

name: Fuji
description_html:
Fuji is an active, curious boy who enjoys getting out to explore the world with his nose. He appears to be housetrained and loves spending his walks sniffing new scents and investigating his surroundings. He's also food motivated, making treats a great way to build a bond with him.


While he enjoys time in the play yard, he's more interested in exploring than playing and will happily let you know when he's ready to head out.


Fuji is resistant to returning to his kennel, so patience, high-value treats, and positive reinforcement go a long way. With continued training, structure, and regular exercise, Fuji has all the potential to become a wonderful companion for an active home ready to help him build confidence and polish his leash manners.

name: Luna
description_html:
Don’t let her Resting Mad Face fool you - Luna is a sweet and playful pint-size princess! She loves to play with her spring toys, have her neck rubbed, and to watch the summer bugs at the window while you work.

She may have had a difficult start to life, and is a bit on the sensitive side when in a new place or meeting new people. But don’t worry, once she’s settled she’ll let you know she runs the place! Unsure how she might be with other cats, but she definitely doesn’t want to share her space with a dog. Will she find her forever home with you?

name: Spirulina
description_html: Sweet Spirulina has a heart and coat of gold and is ready to share her deep sense of joy and calm with her forever person. Making excellent use of her litter box, she keeps her cage clean and is most content lounging on a soft surface with some hay to munch. She also loves to hop around and requires ample time outside her cage to stretch her adorable little legs.

name: Lupe Fiasco
description_html:
Lupe is a 5-year-old sweetheart with a gentle soul and a heart full of love. This handsome boy already knows "sit" and "shake," and he's happy to show off his excellent manners for treats and praise. He absolutely loves people and is happiest when he's snuggled up beside you, soaking up affection and handing out plenty of kisses in return.


Despite being a big dog, Lupe is wonderfully easy to walk on a leash and enjoys getting out for strolls with his favorite humans. He's the kind of companion who is content to be by your side, whether you're relaxing at home, taking a walk around the neighborhood, or settling in for a cozy evening on the couch.


Lupe has the easygoing personality to thrive in either a house or an apartment, as long as he has people to love and a comfortable place to call his own.


If you're looking for a loyal, affectionate best friend who will greet you with kisses and stay close for snuggles, Lupe may be the perfect match for you.

name: Aries
description_html: Aries is quite curious and vocal when he sees other dogs, often wagging his tail in hopes of joining a playgroup. Beyond socializing, he absolutely loves the water. If a pool isn't available, he will try to create one using his drinking buckets. Once his social and splashing needs are met, he is very happy to come over for human snuggles.

name: Contexto
description_html:
Contexto is a total dreamboat - a smiley, handsome guy who will sweep you off your feet if you let him.

He’s a little shy at first, but warms up really quickly. He’s a calm and easy leash-walker, checking in with his person often. He’s an ace at commands like “sit” and “shake”, but he also has a silly, playful side. He loves belly rubs, snuggling, and most of all just being near his people.

name: Phil
description_html: Cuddly, inquisitive Phil will be a wonderful addition to any home. Phil is quiet, playful, friendly, eats well, enjoys the company of our small dogs and is curious about our very old cat. (She's a bit pet fussy.) Phil has been in his foster home recovering from a few patches of ringworm and has been cleared by the veterinarian staff. He's ready to go to his forever home, hopefully one with a playmate. Phil has not been around kids but he's very friendly so he should do well. He's at that age where playing includes nibbling and jumping on people so working on correction. Phil is neutered and ready to go.

name: Blue
description_html: Blue is a perfect angel who found his way to the shelter through no fault of his own. He is extremely house-trained- saving his business all day until a volunteer of staff member can take him out for his 20 minutes of freedom. He’s extremely friendly to anyone he interacts with, playful and well-mannered on a leash. His intake notes even say he loved successfully with two cats! It’s obvious this boy has been loved before and is looking forward to being someone’s forever companion again. Come meet him at the shelter today!

name: Hazel
description_html:
Hi everyone! I'm Hazel. My people had a misfortune and I was alone so I was brought to this new place. The people here are very nice to me, they treat me like the grand lady I am, making me feel really special with the prettiest collar and nice bedding for my woman's size frame. People tell me I have the prettiest eyes, hazel of course. I love to meet people and 'specially like to go for short walks and lounge in the pool. I'm also really good at keeping those dang lizards away from the place too! My friends here said I'm on track to graduate from the senior class but I must find a suitable life mission--I said "I know, I'm trying really hard". So will you please consider me for an indoors job? I'm spayed, heart worm negative and ready to leave as fast as your vehicle travels and I'll keep the little critters away from your place too. Hope to see you soon - with much love waiting, Hazel.

See my short IG video here.

name: Precious
description_html:
Meet Precious — and yes, her name fits her perfectly.


Precious is a 3-year-old sweetheart who is learning that life can be soft, safe, and full of love. Her previous owner made the heartbreaking decision to surrender her due to financial hardship, and before coming to the shelter, Precious spent much of her time the last 3 months living in a backyard. Because of that, new people and environments can feel a little overwhelming at first.


Give her a little patience, though, and you’ll quickly see her true personality shine through. Once Precious feels comfortable, she transforms into an affectionate cuddle bug who will happily curl up in your lap and soak up every bit of love you offer.


She’s a low-energy girl who seems content with the simple things — a comfy bed, a calm home, gentle companionship, and someone she can trust. She also appears to be house trained, making her an easy companion for a lucky adopter.


Precious is looking for a family that understands that some dogs just need a little extra time to bloom. In return, she’ll give you quiet loyalty, sweet cuddles, and a bond that feels truly special.

If you’re searching for a gentle soul to love, Precious may be the perfect addition to your home.

name: Molly
description_html: Molly is a sweet, smiley dog who was found roaming near Research Blvd. She adapted to the foster home very quickly and is house trained! She loves belly rubs and is always excited to meet new people. Molly would be an amazing family dog. She loves outside and would be very happy with a yard to play in!

name: Melos
description_html: Melos found himself in a shelter after years of home life and is fearful of the loud shelter environment. He opens up with some patience and people who will go at his own pace. He has good leash skills, is housetrained, and could live in an apartment or a house. He is truly a softie!

name: Finley
description_html:
Meet Finley! 🐾 (Or as we like to call him: our “TEMU Shiba Inu” 🐕) Finley is an approximately 1-year-old medium/large mixed breed dog with a sweet personality and so much love to give. After being found as a stray and likely dumped by his previous owners, he’s been working hard learning what it means to feel safe, cared for, and part of a home. 🏡


In his time with us, Finley has made incredible progress:

• Potty-trained and house-broken

• Walks well on a leash, knows “sit,” and is learning additional commands

• Does well when left alone: is non-destructive and minimal barking

• Crate-trained

• Dog friendly and would likely do well with children (unsure about cats)

• Fully vaccinated, microchipped, and neutered


Finley has overcome a lot already, and now he’s ready for a forever home where he can continue to thrive. He’s goofy, loving, eager to learn, and truly deserves a family of his own! 🧡

name: Muffy
description_html:
Muffy is a cutie with a squeaky meow more like a little mouse! She's cute, even if she prefers us to keep our distance at first. She came in with several other cats from an outdoor community where the caregiver passed away.

Muffy seems to get along well with other cats so we've added her to our Cactus Cat program where she can get comfort from cat friends and some confidence building training from volunteers. She's very shy and will likely need a patient, cat savvy adopter to help her through a transition to a home.

Ask about Muffy if you think you can be her special someone!

I am a DHC, and I have my own webpage!

The adoption fee is waived for Muffy and ALL Desperate Housecats/Cactus Cats!

name: Mo Mo
description_html:
Mo Mo is honestly the total package- she's sweet, chill, and incredibly adaptable. From day one, she has just fit right in and rolled with the punches. She absolutely adores every human and dog she meets, and her main goal in life is really just to be your absolute best friend.
