Pixie has a calm, easygoing personality and absolutely loves being close to her people. She happily allows nail trims and handles gentle care like a champ, showing just how trusting and well-mannered she is.


Her favorite thing in the world? Snuggling. Pixie would be thrilled to curl up beside you—or even better, right in your lap—for some quality cuddle time. If you’re looking for a soft-hearted companion who will happily keep you company and shower you with quiet affection, Pixie might be the perfect match.

name: Moose
description_html: Meet Moose, a two-year-old gray brindle pitbull with a zest for life that's contagious! Moose is the kind of dog who finds joy in everything—especially his toys, which he absolutely adores. Moose is sweet to his core and already knows "sit," showing he's eager to learn and please the people he loves. An active family or individual who enjoys playtime, training, and maybe a game of fetch will find in Moose not just an energetic sidekick, but a loyal, affectionate friend ready to make every day a little more fun.

name: Mojito
description_html: Look at that face! Meet Mojito, a splash of pure joy looking for his forever home. This striking boy instantly grabs your attention with his unique, captivating eyes—one beautiful blue, one warm brown. But it’s his massive, goofy smile and floppy ears that will truly steal your heart. Mojito is the ultimate enthusiast; he loves exploring the outdoors, leaning in close for affection, and flashing his signature grin for the camera. He’s a happy, active companion who brings bright, sunny energy wherever he goes. Ready to add a little extra flavor and endless love to your life? Mojito is your boy!

name: Maxine
description_html:
Maxine = Perfection!


Hi! I am Maxine. I thought I would take the time to write my bio, since I am looking for my forever home - even though I love my current house with my big Boxer sister. I want to start off by saying I love the company of other dogs! I don’t know if I have been around cats before, so I cannot tell you if I get along with them or not. I am super friendly and have very good manners when I am playing. You’d think since I am so young that I would have endless energy, but I actually like lounging around – preferably sitting in your lap, chewing on my bones, or sunbathing outside. That is not to say I don’t play – check me out on my profile videos - but I am mostly very laid back. That is…until you mention “walk”. I cannot contain myself! I run around, grab my toys, run into my fur sister, grab my mom’s shoe, and spin around. Now, I do calm down once we actually get to the door, but until then, I am just so excited! If you like easy walkers, then I am your girl. I am a very loose leash walker and not reactive to other dogs. But, those little lizards….that’s another story! If I do see one, all you have to do is say my name and I refocus and leave them alone - just be sure to hold tight to my leash!

I love my squeaky toys, treats, and water! I am a total water baby. My foster mom bought me a pool and I love it – if you don’t believe me – check out the video of me in my pool! I am extremely house trained and to this day have not torn anything up – including my toys! I am a very quick learner and very polite! I am not a frequent barker, don’t seem to show any signs of separation anxiety, and loud noises don’t seem to bother me. Really, no red flags at all, which means that I am the perfect pup for you!

I do take a little bit of time to warm up to people, especially if it is more than one person at a time. So any introduction needs to be slow and I need to be given enough space to feel everything out. But, once I am all warmed up, be prepared for me to sit perched in your lap! Treats are a pretty good motivator to warm me up as well!

Let me know if you would like to meet up! 


When she was in the shelter, she was a volunteer favorite, and her friends try to get all the other volunteers to meet her because "everyone should get to experience the absolute sweet, gentle, and kind love that will melt your heart from this girl".


Maxine is spayed, heartworm negative, and ready for adoption today!

name: Nicholas
description_html:
Nicholas is a handsome pup whose striking black-and-white tuxedo markings—complete with the cutest freckles—are perfectly matched by his dapper and polite personality. As you can see from his bright, happy gaze and ready-for-action grin, he is a cheerful bundle of playfulness and affection. Nicholas is the ultimate social butterfly; he is incredibly loving and forms instant bonds with every human he meets. 

True to his lively nature, Nicholas’s favorite time is playtime. He's an expert-level toy enthusiast and has never met a squeaky toy or ball he didn't adore. While he has plenty of playful energy, he’s also a gentleman on outdoor adventures, handling nicely on a leash. 

If you are looking for a playful, loving, and well-mannered companion to bring endless joy to your home, this tuxedo-clad charm is waiting for you!

name: Rascal
description_html:
Meet Rascal—your future 60-pound lap dog!


Rascal is ready to leave his past behind and start the next chapter of his life with a loving forever family. This handsome boy is as easy going as they come and has quickly become a volunteer favorite.


Rascal walks beautifully on leash and enjoys relaxed strolls where he can take in the world by your side. He’s a loose-leash walker who makes walks a breeze. While he enjoys getting out and about, what Rascal really loves most is simply being near his people.


With his calm, even-keeled personality and affectionate nature, Rascal is the kind of dog who fits right in and makes every day a little brighter. And did we mention how handsome he is?


Rascal can’t wait to meet his forever family - maybe that’s you!

name: Dandelion
description_html: Dandelion loves to cuddle! She's very people focused and enjoys having fun with whoever is hanging out with her. She's a playful, friendly girl who was brought in as a stray, but we can tell she had a home at some point. Dandelion is crate trained and mellow once she gets all her wiggles out. This fun girl is ready for a loving home today!

name: Ella
description_html:
Adorable Ella (after Fitzgerald, of course!) is a resilient little girl! She was one of over 50+ dogs seized recently in a hoarding case. She appears to have had multiple litters, so she was possibly in a puppy mill situation. Ella was one of the more traumatized dogs of the group. In any case, that's all in the past now and she is recovering in a loving foster home and learning to be a dog. She lives with the foster's two large male dogs and everyone gets along fine. Despite Ella's difficult start in life, she has never snapped or bitten or even shown her teeth. She is just nervous and needs a patient, experienced dog person to adopt her and give her the life she deserves because she is the PERFECT dog for someone!! She's only about 15 lbs so she is a great lap dog but also needs plenty of exercise. Fetch is her life. It's her job and she's very serious about it! She needs someone who will throw the ball for her every day.

With a few months of TLC in foster, Ella has come out of her shell a LOT and enjoys belly rubs and snuggles now! With the right adopter, she will continue to relax and forget the past and blossom into herself. She would make a great companion for an active retired person or remote worker. She can be left alone in the house for a few hours at a time. She waits at the door for you to come home and will "chit chat" at you when you come back and tell you how much she missed you! It's the cutest!

Overall, Ella needs a calm quiet home with a stable routine. Due to her fear of loud noises and general anxiety, Ella is probably not the best candidate to live with children. Due to her small size, she could live in an apartment but needs a fenced area to fetch daily. She even enjoys fetching in the house too! :)


Potential adopters should read the breed characteristics of the Schipperke as they are a great description: https://www.akc.org/dog-breeds/schipperke/

They really describe Ella's personality: very serious and can be timid and overly cautious at first due to her trauma. But can you blame her? Humans have not been very good to her so far. But she's learning not all humans are bad!

name: Velveteen
description_html:
Meet Velveteen ~

Here is the sweetest, gentlest, quietest lady in the room. She has distinctive features like a bunny hop in her trot, and no tail, earning her a sweet rabbit tale name. She loves to quietly watch life unfold, from a window view, or a patio.

Velveteen is a very smart and food motivated pup, eager to follow instructions for a tasty treat. She knows “sit”, “paw”, “other paw” , and “lie down”. There’s nothing Velveteen loves more than snuggling up to her person, and as the ultimate cuddle bug she would do best in a home where she can always be around her human companion. She loves to go for car rides, is house trained, crate trained, very well behaved in the bath, and butter smooth on a leash. Though her little hippity hop limits the distance she can walk, it doesn’t stop her from enjoying her time outside! She's a great compact size, and combined with her good manners, she makes an easy fit in many home environments. She shares her space nicely with a large lady senior dog friend and though she is wary of cats, she shows interest in meeting new pups. With proper introductions and consistent interactions she’ll have the confidence to make new canine friends.

She's spayed, vaccinated, heart worm negative and has had recent bloodwork completed.

Velveteen has an advocacy group of volunteers - if you have questions, write us at caring@classiccanines.org

name: Baby Acorn
description_html: She would do best in a home with one or more dogs as she seems to thrive with other dogs. She’s a tad nervous of the world, so having other confident dogs around her helps her not feel like the world is too scary! She’s loves to swim, snuggle and play with her foster brother. She does well in the crate, no issues! She takes a bit of time to trust and warm up to her humans, but once she does, she’s very affectionate and sweet. She doesn’t have a mean bone in her body! She also loves to fetch 💕

name: Bobby
description_html:
Big Boy Bobby - Bobby for short - has never met a ball or person he doesn't like. Bobby is dog-social, sweet, and so very handsome. He'd love to play fetch with his new people, and wouldn't mind a well-matched dog sibling. At the very least, please bring him a home with a lot of balls - his very, very favorite - he will love to prance by you showing off his ball, wiggling his entire body, and then drop his ball and roll on top of it he's just that excited!


Come meet this big-headed, bigger-hearted guy asap - he's waiting for you!

name: Princess
description_html: This sweet, one-year-old girl is smart, loyal, energetic, affectionate, and goofy. She LOVES food and toys and enjoys playing with other dogs. She responds well to training and redirection. She is a very happy dog, and zoomies will occur once she feels safe with her family and in her environment. She is housebroken and sleeps well in her crate. She is a velcro dog who will curl up beside you and snuggle. By the way, she is almost 45 lbs now (not 36 lbs as the shelter indicates).

name: Babushka
description_html: Babushka is a precious little pocket pittie. She may be a little shy at first but soon warms up. Babushka is quiet in her kennel, walks easily on leash and calmly passes barking dogs. In the play yard, she enjoys exploring and checking out a few toys. This sweet young girl especially likes to be close to her person and loves cuddling. She is ready to find her forever home and become a cherished companion. Come meet Babushka and fall in love. ❤️

name: Cheyenne
description_html: Cheyenne is a fun loving, playful gal who loves outings with people! She's done well with older kids, and though she may be shy with men at first, she warms up with proper introductions. Cheyenne would love a space where she can feel free to let all her zoomies out. She's not afraid of a cuddle session either. This affectionate girl is a quiet companion for the home, and she's ready to be your family today!

name: Bolt
description_html:
Meet Bolt: a happy, silly, and playful boy who’s discovering just how wonderful the world can be.

Bolt loves spending time with his people and finds comfort simply being by your side. He’s always up for a great game of fetch and would make an amazing adventure buddy.

After a day of fun, Bolt is just as happy to settle in and show his affectionate side. He has so much love to give and enjoys being close to the people he trusts. He’s also very house-trained, making him an easy addition to a home.

With his unique personality and joyful spirit, Bolt truly is a special dog. All he needs now is a forever family to share life’s adventures with.

Could that be you?

--

name: Lucy
description_html:
Lucy is the kind of dog who makes you earn her trust—and then rewards you tenfold. ❤️


This gorgeous heeler mix can be a little shy when meeting new people and may take some time to warm up. But with a little patience, you'll discover a loving, loyal girl who thinks her favorite humans are the greatest people on earth.


Once you're in Lucy's circle, she's a total velcro dog. She loves snuggles, showering you with kisses, gently pawing for attention, and tagging along wherever you go. She's happiest enjoying a good sniffy walk, soaking up life's simple pleasures, and spending time with her people.


And when she's feeling extra happy? Lucy breaks out into the cutest zippy zoomies around the yard that are guaranteed to make you smile. She's also a fantastic size—not too big, not too small—making her an easy companion for all kinds of adventures.


If you're willing to give her a chance to come out of her shell, Lucy will be the kind of companion who loves you with her whole heart. She's absolutely worth the wait.

name: Molly
description_html:
***Molly is currently available for adoption in the Boulder/Denver CO area***

Meet Molly!

This incredibly sweet, gentle girl is an absolute breeze. Molly is the most mild mannered, easy girl you'll ever meet. She's perfectly house trained, walks calmly on a leash, and sleeps through the night without a peep. She's crate trained, takes treats gently from your hand, and naps while you're away at work or running errands.

Molly loves other dogs and would be happy to have a canine companion in her forever home. Molly's goofy side comes out when she first goes outside in the morning and rolls around in the grass filled with joy. She also loves a good play session with her dog friends. While Molly is independent, she also really enjoys being pet and makes the cutest little whines when she's getting good scritches. She'll lean into you and might even somersault into your lap for a snuggle.

Molly would make the most wonderful family dog and could fit into most any home. Click the "get started" button to be connected to Molly's foster and learn more about this amazing girl!

name: Bruce
description_html:
Meet Bruce!


Bruce is a 4-year-old sweetheart with a playful spirit and a lot of love to give. This handsome boy enjoys tug-of-war, wrestling, and going on walks, and he absolutely thrives on human attention and affection. Once he trusts you, Bruce is incredibly loving, loyal, and eager to be close to his people.

Bruce has had a difficult and unstable start in life, but despite that, he remains a sweet and gentle dog at heart.


He is house-trained, enjoys spending time outdoors, and has been described as loving, playful, and “a sweetie deep down.” Bruce also understands some Spanish along with English!


Bruce would do best in a stable home with patient adopters and plenty of opportunities for exercise and companionship. He has spent much of his time outside and alone, so he deserves a family who can help him feel safe, included, and cared for.


Bruce is ready for a fresh start and a forever home where he can finally relax, learn, and be loved the way every dog deserves.


Bruce is neutered, heart worm negative, and ready to leave the shelter today!

name: Bee
description_html:
Bee is very sweet, but she’s also very shy with people. She was brought to AAS from the community, and during her spay surgery, the DVM found mucosa of bladder to be protruding cranially, so the tissue was resected. She moved into foster care to recover and to be monitored. The results of several ultrasounds indicate that her bladder has healed completely. Her urinary habits are normal at this time.

As a member of our Cactus Cats program, Bee is becoming more comfortable with humans. She tends to hide, but likes to be petted. She is not aggressive, she’s just learning to appreciate all the things that people are good for.

Bee will do best in a home with a cat buddy. She was friends with Cassia in their foster home.

I am a DHC, and I have my own webpage!

The adoption fee is waived for Bee and ALL Desperate Housecats/Cactus Cats!

name: Milo
description_html:
Milo was once lost but now has found a temporary home through the shelter in the comforts of a foster home. He's calm and friendly, sweet and affectionate, has nice leash manners and allows the nearby deer to be undisturbed. He's at peace with nature's creatures.


This easy relaxing boy has not a care in the world. He enjoys simple companionship and having a cozy blanket to curl up on. His motto.... "Life is good". He loves people and welcomes in all the friends and family and he's so silky soft and cuddly! He travels great for road trips, has stayed in tents while camping, and in hotel rooms, and he's as quiet as a church mouse. He often even puts himself to bed when he's tired. Enjoy his beach photos. The point is, Milo is happy wherever you want to be, whether on land, near the water, or excursions in between. And when you have to be away a few hours, he'll take care of himself, and welcome you upon your return.

Connect with his foster at his link to meet up with this very special gentleman.

name: Strudel
description_html: Strudel came in with several other cats from a difficult situation. Despite this, she's affectionate and learning to be braver each day. She may be found in a hiding spot, but she will gladly accept pets and ask for more if you are patient with her. She loves Churu so that may be a great way to make friends. Strudel may enjoy a friendly cat companion in her new home or the company of one of her mates.

name: Billie
description_html:
Billie is a sweet, loyal girl who has blossomed beautifully in foster care. While she may be a little shy when meeting new people, all she really needs is a little patience, a few treats, and some time to realize you’re a friend. Once she trusts you, Billie becomes the ultimate companion—following you from room to room, curling up beside you at bedtime, and filling your days with unconditional love.


At a svelte 37 pounds, she’s the perfect size for a home or an apartment. 


Billie has been living with another dog in her foster home and has been an excellent canine companion. She loves to play, wrestle, chase, and be chased, and she’s happy to share toys and engage in friendly games of tug-of-war. She would likely thrive in a home with another playful dog, but she would also be perfectly happy as your one-and-only best friend.


An active girl, Billie enjoys daily walks and outdoor adventures. She’s wonderful on leash, enjoys exploring the neighborhood, and rides beautifully in the car. One of her favorite car ride habits is resting her head on her person’s arm while watching the world go by—a guaranteed heart-melter.


Billie is house-trained, non-destructive, and has proven she can be trusted at home while her people are away. She’s eager to please, highly treat-motivated, and continues to gain confidence every day. While she may bark briefly when visitors arrive, she settles quickly and warms up even faster when treats are involved. Especially CHEESE!


Billie loves activity and engagement, but is content to curl up under the desk and snooze as her person works. She’d do best with a family that can provide regular exercise, playtime, and companionship. She has lots of energy for fun but an equally impressive capacity for snuggles once the day is done.


The best thing about Billie is her heart. Beneath her initially cautious exterior is an incredibly loving, devoted dog who forms deep bonds with her people. If you’re willing to give her a little time to settle in, she’ll reward you with a lifetime of loyalty, affection, and companionship.


Billie is ready to find the forever home she deserves. Could that be with you?

name: Butters
description_html:
Butters arrived with an active much smaller sized dog friend who since found a new home. Butters is waiting for his next adventure in life while sharing his kennel space with another large dog. He loves being part of all the activity going on inside and out, and seems perfectly suited for an active lifestyle. He's not ready to slow down any time soon. He'll charm you to the moon and back, along with all your friends too as a great house and walk companion.


Butters and his original doggie accomplice had a mishap with chickens before arriving to the shelter. Expect that Butters may treat small mammals as prey or sport and his home should have a well secured fence.


Check out his Instagram account HERE!

name: Nino
description_html:
Nino is a showstopper with one bright blue eye and one warm brown eye—truly one of a kind!

 

Once he’s out and about, Nino is a laid-back, happy boy with a constantly wagging tail. He’s a mostly loose-leash walker who loves sniffing on walks and showing off his good manners—he even knows commands like check in and sit! Nino is house trained and can be very affectionate. He loves to play with toys, especially any rope toy he can find!

 

Nino does best with slow introductions and prefers to be outside of his kennel. With a little patience, this unique-eyed boy quickly becomes a loving partner. 

 

Ready to fall for those unforgettable eyes? Come meet Nino!

name: Clove
description_html: Clove is one of many cats who were found abandoned in a residence. He is shy and unsure of the shelter, which is completely natural given all that he's been through. Clove and all of his feline friends may need some reassurance in a new place and some time to get used to new people. They are all looking for a loving home where they can relax and show their true personalities.

name: Chili
description_html: Chili is one of many cats who were found abandoned in a residence. She is shy and unsure of the shelter, which is completely natural given all that he's been through. Chili and all of her feline friends may need some reassurance in a new place and some time to get used to new people. They are all looking for a loving home where they can relax and show their true personalities. They may do well in a space with other cats or can go home together.

name: Simba
description_html: Simba is a graduate of our Enduring Service program! To learn more about this program, read about it on our website. According to his Enduring Service program handlers, Simba is a smart and beautiful puppy. Can be a little shy at first but once he gains your trust he loves to play and get all the attention. Has great leash skills and listens very well. Is treat motivated and a fast learner. He is well behaved when it's bath time, loves getting in the water. His favorite game to play is tug-of-war. Listens very well when being told to drop things he should not have. Gets along well with other dogs so could go home with a well-matched companion. He knows commands such as sit, stay, down, off, drop it, paw and roll over. Simba would make a great addition to any family

name: Siel
description_html:
SUPER handsome Siel was brought to AAS from the community, and he’s so friendly, we think he was someone’s pet before. In the shelter, he loves being petted, and is comfortable being picked up. Loud noises bother him, and he can be reactive to being startled.

We would love to see Siel out of this environment through either adoption or foster. He may be fine with other cats, but slow and proper intros are a must. He needs someone with cat experience who understands his behavior and will work with him.

I am a DHC, and I have my own webpage! http://www.desperatehousecats.info/flyers/Siel21560.pdf

The adoption fee is waived for Siel and ALL Desperate Housecats!

name: Firefly
description_html: Firefly is a graduate of our Enduring Service program! To learn more about this program, read about it on our website. Firefly is a gentle young dog that will give you all the love and attention you want. According to his Enduring Service program handlers, he loves playing with other dogs, knows how to entertain himself with chew toys. He is kennel trained and knows basic commands like sit and stay. Has great leash skills and can be easily redirected from distractions. Firefly is a good-natured dog who would be great in any home even possibly ones that have small children. This perfect puppy is ready for his forever home

name: Leo
description_html:
Meet Leo — the dog who woke up looking like he already nailed his eyeliner.


Seriously, we don’t know how he does it. No smudges, no effort, just natural, bold, “I’m-ready-for-my-close-up” eyes that turn heads everywhere he goes. But Leo isn’t just a pretty face (though… wow, yeah, he really is).


Leo is young, happy, very house trained, and completely tuned in to people. He loves being around you, whether that means heading out for a walk, hopping in the car like a seasoned road trip buddy, or just leaning into you for pets like it’s his full-time job. Treats? Obviously yes. Attention? Even better.


Leo is just a genuinely good dog who seems ready to slide right into someone’s life and make it better.


If you’ve been waiting for a sign… this is Leo, blinking at you with perfect eyeliner and a handsome face.


Email his volunteer advocates at orangedotcrew@gmail.com to meet him. He’s ready when you are.

name: Kya
description_html:
Kya is a sweet, playful companion who loves walks and loves to be interactive with people - she's part diva and part funny ham.

She's still learning the ropes of being in a busy, very public kennel building- it can be downright scary for new arriving dogs, so if she steps outside for a moment when you're near, don't take offense-ask for help to meet her instead and you'll get to meet the real Kya, plus maybe you've save her the expense of having to endure more time in a shelter.

She does her best to keep a neat, tidy kennel while walks come just once or twice daily. She's spayed, vaccinated, and heart worm negative and ready to leave right away.

Her advocates at ClassicCaninesATX have adoption support specials too-ask staff about them or reach out to caring@classiccanines.org

name: Saul
description_html: Better call Saul! If you're in a jam, he's your man. He will save you from loneliness, boredom and won't charge you extra fees for his superior doggie services. Saul loves outings and walks, and really appreciates play time! He gets excited at the prospect of leaving his boring kennel and gets wiggly when it's outdoor break time. Meet this active and affectionate guy today!

name: Memphis
description_html: Memphis is a playful young pup who enjoys the company of dogs.

name: Neo
description_html:
Neo is a handsome gentleman with the most beautiful green-eyed gaze. After arriving at the shelter scared and shut down, He’s now living in foster care where his incredible personality is once again shining.

Neo is social, cuddly, treat-motivated, and loves being brushed. He bonds deeply with the humans he trusts and has so much love to give (he’s the perfect mix of independent and affectionate). He has a unique behavior issue, so he needs an attentive adopter. He has suspected pica, meaning he compulsively tries to eat non-food items like socks, hair ties, string, and other small objects. Because of this, Neo’s adopter should provide a clean, carefully managed home and keep unsafe items out of reach.

This small effort is well worth it for the companionship and love you will receive from Neo.

I am a DHC, and I have my own webpage!

The adoption fee is waived for Neo and ALL Desperate Housecats!

name: Cicero
description_html:
Cicero is the kind of dog who steals hearts without even trying. With his gentle spirit and soulful eyes, it’s truly impossible not to fall in love with him the moment you meet him.


This sweet boy loves going on walks and has beautiful leash manners. Cicero is also a big fan of ear scratches—give him a few and you’ll see his whole face light up with pure happiness.


Cicero is super house trained, sits for treats, and his calm demeanor has made him a volunteer's favorite.


If you’re looking for a loyal, loving companion who will bring warmth and peaceful energy into your home, Cicero might just be your perfect match. But, be prepared for a lot of wet kisses. 🐾💛

name: Gatsby
description_html:
Gatsby carries a distinguished name and the heart of a comedian. We’re not sure if he knows how funny he is or if it’s just a happy coincidence, but either way he keeps his volunteer buddies entertained with his quirky antics!


Gatsby explores the world around him with curious sniffing and checks in with his handler for reassuring words and pats. He is playful and silly, sometimes enjoys toys but not at all interested in the water yet, thank you! Maybe another Texas summer will change his mind. 


This handsome spotted boy has demonstrated the ability to play gently with other dogs and could live with a well matched doggie sibling. Gatsby comes with the love and full support of the Orange Dot Crew volunteer team who is ready to help him leave shelter life in the past. 


Gatsby is an amazing dog!! He is so hilarious and just gives you a look like “hey friend let’s play!” He is pretty easy to walk and loves to play in the play yard. He loves people and is super friendly. He’s one of my favorite dogs to walk and whoever adopts him is super lucky.


Interested in Gatsby? Reach out to orangedotcrew@gmail.com for more info!

name: Mocha
description_html:
Mocha is a sweet, affectionate young mom who is discovering just how nice indoor life can be.


Mocha was originally a community cat before coming to AAC in early February. Since then she has quickly learned that life indoors means cozy window naps, kind humans, and lots of love. She is incredibly affectionate, enjoys being held, and loves to cuddle. Instead of loud meows, Mocha communicates with the cutest little chirps.


Mocha is still figuring out toys since she didn’t grow up playing with them, but she’s curious and learning more every day. She is fully litter box trained and has quickly adapted to being an indoor house cat.


She’s friendly with visitors and has done well with a laid-back resident cat in her foster home. She may enjoy a calm cat companion rather than a very high-energy one. She has not been around dogs.


Mocha recently finished raising her adorable kitten, Bean. She has been a great mom, but now that Bean is growing up she’s ready to find a home of her own where she can soak up all the love she deserves.

name: Bentley
description_html:
We’ll never understand how someone could leave Bentley outside during the winter freeze without food, water, or shelter. What we do know is that he’s safe now and showing everyone just what an incredible dog he is.

While Bentley is protected here, what he truly needs is a loving forever family who will show him the unconditional love he deserves.

Bentley is fun, curious, and incredibly affectionate. He has a way of making people laugh with his playful personality, and he’s just as happy to be by your side offering comfort when you need it most. He’s the kind of dog who quickly becomes your best friend.

And let’s not forget, Bentley is basically a dog model! With his good looks and charming personality, he’s sure to turn heads wherever he goes.

Bentley is ready to start his new life filled with love, warmth, and security. Could you be his chance at the forever home he’s been waiting for?

name: Mr. Wendell
description_html:
Meet Mr. Wendell! This handsome guy has a grin that could light up a room and a mouth so big, it seems it was made for holding ALL the tennis balls in the world!

Mr. Wendell is a splash-loving, fetch-obsessed goofball who can turn even a dull day into a comedy show with his playful antics.

He’s a well-trained gentleman, knows his commands, and is motivated by treats, but don’t be fooled, this big boy has a heart as soft as his cuddly belly, ready to melt into your lap after a fun-filled swim or a zooming game of fetch.

If you’re ready for laughter and endless tennis ball chaos, Mr. Wendell is waiting to become your new four-legged best friend!


Interested in Mr. Wendell? Reach out to his friends at orangedotcrew@gmail.com for more info!

name: Ilya
description_html: Ilya is an affectionate, cuddly pup who thrives on connection, physical touch, and love from his people. He's a quick learner who is eager to please and treat motivated (and very gentle when he takes treats). He will sit for a treat and to be leashed up at the door. He is active and playful and loves to take fast laps around the yard with some adorable bunny hop/deer prances in between. He has quick bursts of energy but after 10-15 minutes, he's ready to go lounge around with you. As long as he gets a walk and a few outside breaks during the day, he is more than happy to curl up and quietly nap at your feet or a nearby window for several hour stretches. He walks well on a leash and is non-reactive, but seems interested in other people walking, dogs, and especially squirrels. His previous owner said Ilya hasn't barked at mail or food delivery people and doesn't rush at the door. He is house trained, crate trained, and car ride friendly!

name: Anri
description_html:
To meet Anri is to love Anri.

Our first meeting: I saw a sweet white and orange dog lying on her belly in the green grass. She had a pink squeaky toy in her mouth. I couldn’t imagine a more content dog. Her joy was radiating. A 5 year old girl next to her side gently stroking her, Anri’s tail only wagging more with the kiddos affections.


Not just a lover but also a student! This studious pooch knows sit, down, shake, beg and is ready to learn more! When she’s not self-entertaining with stuffy toys, you can find her leaning in for pets from the nearest human. Every stranger an instant friend.


So sweet! Looks like she is always smiling, has a very calm temperament, and loves baby talk

name: Helios
description_html:
This sweet boy is the perfect mix of playful and affectionate! He has medium energy and would thrive in an active home where he can enjoy walks, playtime, and plenty of love.

He walks nicely on leash with a harness and enjoys getting out for strolls, spending time in the play yard, or exploring during outings. One of his favorite things in the world is a tennis ball—he loves a good game of fetch and will happily bring the ball back, either dropping it at your feet or gently letting you take it from him.

When playtime is over, he’s all about the cuddles. He’s a total snuggler who loves belly rubs and being close to his people. He’s also very gentle, enjoys treats, and already knows the sit command—making training fun and rewarding.

Helios took his appearance on Fox7 in stride: met other guests, walked around the scary station and studio, rode in my car, etc. Perfect gentleman the entire few hours. Helios enjoys car rides but prefers walks and yard time.

He appears to be housetrained, is leash trained, and seems calm when passing other dogs or people on walks. With his playful spirit, loving personality, and fondness for treats, he’s ready to bring lots of joy to his future family!

name: Darnell
description_html:
Darnel is as big-hearted as he is big-eared! 

 This playful, silly boy has lots of energy and loves toys, treats, and a good game of fetch. Once Darnell feels comfortable, his affectionate side really shines. He's gentle taking treats, and knows some tricks like "sit." He also lives with another dog at the shelter and could well with a dog-sibling after a meet and greet.

 Darnell can be a little shy at first and would do great with a patient person who will let him warm up at his own pace. Give him that chance, and you'll gain a loyal companion. 

 Think Darnell might be your guy? Come meet this big-eared goofball!

name: Beefy
description_html:
Meet Beefy! A gentleman with a heart of gold and a personality to match! This lovable goofball is all smiles and wiggles, and he lives for playtime and making new friends.


Beefy is a very calm, gentle guy. He enjoys sitting in the grass and cuddling. Walks loosely on the leash and is very chill.


He would be a very low maintenance pet and just wants to hang out. Very very easygoing guy.

name: Lucius
description_html:
Meet Lucius! 🐾

Lucius is a sweet, smiley boy with a tender heart and gentle nature. He’s housetrained, walks beautifully on leash, and is very treat-motivated—making him an easy companion to spend time with.

A little shy at first, Lucius can be timid in new situations and may pull when he feels unsure, but he warms up with patience and kindness. Once comfortable, his soft personality and quiet sweetness really shine.

If you’re looking for a gentle, sensitive pup who just needs a little confidence and a lot of love, Lucius could be your special guy.

name: Jagger
description_html:
Jagger, with his cute ears, is the ultimate best friend looking for his forever home! At 50 pounds of pure charm, this sleek, handsome guy is as well-mannered as he is striking. Jagger is house-trained, great on a leash, and ready to settle into your daily routine with ease.

His favorite thing in the world? A good game of fetch! Jagger is always ready to show off his impressive athleticism and playful spirit. When it’s time to head out for an adventure, he’s a total pro, making him the perfect companion for strolls through your favorite Austin park or neighborhood trails.

With his soulful eyes and sweet personality, Jagger is ready to bring endless joy and companionship to a loving family. Come meet this perfect boy and get ready to fall in love!

name: Vittorio
description_html: Vittorio is a compact model of love and charm that comes equipped with extra peripheral vision. He knows a thing or two about keeping a tidy house, as he keeps his kennel clean and seems house trained. While he may look worried, that's just him waiting to see if his attempts at telepathy are working--he wants to read your mind, share his own ideas with you, and make you happy! He can't wait to show you he's the goodest boy who loves back scratches, playing fetch, and walks with you on the other end of his leash!

name: Rusty
description_html:
Meet Rusty 💛

Rusty is a joyful, fun-loving pup who's ready to find his forever family! With his sweet nature and boundless energy, he brings happiness everywhere he goes. He loves being part of the action-whether that's playing fetch in the yard, going for neighborhood walks, or simply curling up near his favorite people after a day of fun.

Rusty thrives on attention and companionship. He's happiest when he's included and involved, making him a wonderful match for an active family or someone looking for a loyal best friend by their side.

The best part? Rusty already has a great foundation! He's potty trained, crate trained, and knows his basic commands. He's smart, eager to please, and loves learning new things-so continued training will be both easy and fun.

If you're looking for a loving, playful, and devoted companion who will greet you with a wagging tail and endless affection, Rusty could be the perfect addition to your home. He's ready to give his whole heart to his forever family-could that be you? 🐾💕

name: River
description_html: River showed up at the home of a nice person who gave her a chance indoors and she blossomed. While she may be shy in a kennel, she is lovable and affectionate in the home. She has a cute little void face and big eyes that blink slowly when we chat with her. She may do well with a cat friend (as most cats who come from outdoors do). River is looking for a calm place to relax and show her true self.

name: Ivy
description_html:
Meet Ivy: A Sweet, Loving Companion 🌿

Ivy is a gentle, affectionate girl who thrives on companionship. She walks nicely on a loose leash, is impressively responsive to her name when called, and loves napping while cuddled up with you on the couch.

She enjoys walks in nature and taking in all the sights and smells. Ivy is curious about squirrels (she’ll happily pause to watch them in a tree) but with a little encouragement or a treat, she’s easy to redirect and continue on her walk.

Ivy gets along well with other dogs, greeting them politely and enjoying relaxed, friendly interactions. She’s also courteous and calm indoors, making her easy to live with in almost any setting.

Ivy can be a bit sensitive to loud or new noises, but reassurance from her person quickly settles her. She's housetrained, well-behaved indoors, and respects boundaries unless invited onto furniture. Smart and intuitive, it seems that she would learn a routine quickly.

Ivy’s previous family was heartbroken to have to surrender her due to breed restrictions at their new apartment—through no fault of her own. Now she’s looking for a forever home that will appreciate her love, intelligence, and cuddly personality.


Ideal Home: Ivy would thrive in a household with adults, teens, and/or another compatible dog. She’s ready for adventures, walks, treats, and most importantly, endless cuddles.

name: Scout
description_html:
Scout is a striking 6yo tuxedo cat who is a true companion at heart. She is a social girl who loves nothing more than being around her people and will often be found curled up right on the bed for a long nap. Scout is an expert at finding the coziest hiding spots for a deep sleep, but she also has a fun, energetic side that comes out during her nightly zoomies.

Scout is incredibly easy to please, showing enthusiasm for every toy she finds and excitement for any treat offered to her. She may get overstimulated in certain situations, so needs an adopter who understands that behavior and will respect her boundaries when she gets a little too excited.

Scout tells us she prefers to be the only pet in the home so that she can be adored for all her unique qualities!

I am a DHC, and I have my own webpage!

The adoption fee is waived for Scout and ALL Desperate Housecats!

name: Daisy
description_html:
Thelma was found running in the busy road right outside of the shelter. Thankfully she was caught before anything happened to her, and she is now at Austin Animal Services!


Thelma may give a few barks when you walk by her kennel but once that gate is open she can’t get into your lap fast enough! If you are looking for a cuddle bug then this is your girl!


💛 Sweetheart

💛 Cuddly

💛 Playful

💛 Great on Leash

💛 Treat Motivated

💛 Volunteer Favorite

name: Noelia
description_html:
Hi, I’m Noelia 💕


I’m sweet, cuddly, and my biggest dream is to be the perfect best friend to my forever family.


I’m a very affectionate girl currently living with my foster brother, Ollie, and we’ve truly become best friends. I’m dog-social and love having a buddy around!


I may be pretty, but I’ve got so much more to offer. While I’m almost the total package, no one is 100% perfect. I can get a little spooked by strangers on walks and may bark when I’m on a leash. Because of this, my foster mom thinks I would do best in a home with a backyard.


Inside the home, I’m a total sweetheart. I’m gentle, loving, and happiest when I’m close to my people getting all the affection I can.


My foster mom knows there is someone out there who will feel so lucky to have me, and I know I’ll feel just as lucky to have them.


If you’re ready to give me a loving home and spoil me like the princess I am, I’d love to meet you ✨

name: Courage
description_html:
Courage is a sweet, sensitive boy with a heart full of love—he’s just waiting for the right person to help him feel safe enough to share it. Shelter life is overwhelming for him, and he’s understandably scared in this noisy, unfamiliar environment. What he needs most is someone patient, kind, and willing to give him a little space to come out of his shell at his own pace.

When you let Courage approach you on his terms, he shows you who he truly is: a gentle treat‑taker, a soft hand‑kisser, and a dog who wants so badly to trust. He moves carefully through the world, taking time to understand his surroundings, but every small step he takes is full of bravery.

He walks politely on a leash and stays close, though sudden noises and quick movements can startle him. With time, consistency, and a calm home, he’s sure to blossom into the cuddle bug he’s meant to be.

Courage has the most soulful eyes—eyes that quietly ask for kindness, patience, and love. You can see how much he wants to bond, to feel safe, and to finally relax into a family of his own.

If you’re looking for a gentle companion who will reward your patience with deep, loyal love, Courage is waiting for you.

name: Marcela
description_html:
Marcela's story will touch your heart. See her backstory video

Part of a family for 4 years, her life took a dark turn, leaving her lost, alone, leading her to short term places, but not her happy, stable place. Marcela knows all about loss. She's spent over 900 days in the shelter system. Yet it's simple kindness, a sense of calm, and acceptance, that's the door to her heart, and getting her home.

She's a great house mate cherishing quiet moments of connection with her people, playful moments and a few toys and comforts here and there. It doesn't take much to make her happy and to feel safe, secure and loved.

If you're up for granting a wish, can you consider granting Marcela's wish for a home? She's healthy, spayed and ready to go home today. Inquire to staff onsite for a meet or reach out to her advocates at caring@classiccanines.org for personalized assistance. The only investment is that of your time and love.

name: Bandit
description_html:
Bandit was displaced after a house fire. Despite a big interruption to his life, he's a cheerful guy who loves and bonds sweetly with all his friends, and everyone is a friend of Bandit.

He loves opportunities to be outdoorsy, especially playing with toys and balls, and finishing up with a good chew.

What he wants most from life? The freedom to be in a home setting and not in a kennel, a little time outdoors for play, and people to share his life with. He's bringing all the smiles, can you bring him the home?

Check in at the front desk to meet him or if you are offsite, reach out to his advocates online at ClassicCaninesATX or email: caring@classiccanines.org - we aim to make Bandit's transition home an easy one for adopters by helping with a first exam and providing an online gift card for supplies so you can focus on building his toy collection!

name: Brutus
description_html:
Brutus is a gentle giant. He lounges around most of the day with 3 cats and a bunny. The cats often take over his bed and he allows it. He loves to go on walks and take in all the smells. He is very curious about other dogs but enjoys his space.

A few things to note, he is terrified of thunder, fireworks and any other loud noises. Walks on trash day aren't his favorite and he refuses to go outside if fireworks are being set off... even from quite a distance.

He has so much love to offer and is the perfect mellow couch potato. Crate trained but free roams and is non destructive.

name: Toby
description_html:
Meet Toby, a gentle soul residing at the local shelter. Initially shy, Toby warms up to reveal a

curious and sweet nature. Once comfortable, he unveils a playful side that endears him to all

who spend time with him. Toby's tender approach makes him a perfect companion for quiet

evenings and leisurely walks, where he can explore and learn at his own pace. If you're looking

for a loyal friend who will slowly but surely steal your heart, Toby is your ideal match. His gentle

spirit is just waiting for a place to call home.


Toby is:

  • Housetrained
  • Cuddly with friends
  • Playful and loves a game of fetch, though he may not bring it back
  • Great on leash
  • Extremely smart - will blow through any treat puzzle we give him!
  • An old soul type with some pep in his step

name: Mama Blythe
description_html:
I’m a 3-year-old girl who realized early on that life is better when you slow down and smell the roses. I’m a 60 lb girl who is convinced I’m a lap dog—and because I'm so gentle, I'd likely be a good match for a home with children to join my fan club!


I’m a very good girl who is house-trained and walks like a dream on my leash. I also just learned how to use the stairs! I’m very treat-motivated, so if you have a snack in your hand, you’ll have my full, undivided attention.


I love my squeaky toys, but my true passion is being near my humans. I might be okay with a dog brother or sister if we’re a good match, but I’d like a home without any feline friends. Ready to fill your home with squeaks and tail wags?

name: Ottie Pop
description_html:
Meet Ottie Pop 🍭🐾

Hi, my name is Ottie Pop, and I’m just as fun as I sound! I’m the kind of dog who brings smiles wherever I go. Whether I’m bouncing around during playtime, showing off my goofy personality, or soaking up attention from my favorite humans, I believe life is meant to be enjoyed. I've been given the name Hip Hop Ottie Pop for the way I frolick around entertaining myself or anyone around.


I’m sweet, playful, and always ready to make a new friend. I am a little shy when meeting new friends so slow introductions would be best. I could also live with another dog and ask that you set up a meet and greet with the staff so we can make sure me and the family dog are going to be besties. I’ve got a big heart and an even bigger desire to be part of a family of my very own. If you’re looking for a loyal companion who can make you laugh one minute and melt into your lap the next, I may just be your perfect match.

I love toys, treats, adventures, and quality cuddle time. I’m also pretty smart and eager to learn — especially if snacks and praise are involved. I try my best every day and would thrive with someone who will continue helping me shine.

Most of all, I’m looking for what every shelter dog dreams about:

A home where I feel safe, loved, and included.

I promise to greet you with excitement, love you with my whole heart, and remind you daily that the little things — walks, belly rubs, naps beside your favorite person — are actually the big things.

So what do you think?

Ready to make your life a whole lot sweeter with an Ottie Pop? 💕🐶

name: Josie Rosie
description_html: Meet Josie Rosie, an active tripod girl who would love to be a part of your family!

name: Zane
description_html:
Zane is an 11‑month‑old pup with a zest for life and a personality that’s all sunshine. He’s enthusiastic, happy, and delightfully silly; the kind of dog who can make you laugh without even trying. He already knows sit, walks nicely on leash, and stays non‑reactive when passing other dogs. With the right match, he could happily live with another friendly pup. Add in his love for peanut butter and frolicking in the grass, and you’ve got a goofy, lovable companion who turns every day into something brighter.


He's always so happy and has a huge smile on his face. He's never met a person or dog that didn't become his best friend. He's a rambunctious, playful kiddo with a huge zest for life. He'd do great with a doggy sibling, maybe one that could teach him some house manners and help him settle in. He's got a lot of love to give, just needs someone patient and kind willing to give him the life he deserves.



If you have any questions, please reach out to orangedotcrew@gmail.com.

name: Oreo
description_html:
Oreo is a 5½-year-old sweetheart who's looking for his forever home! He has the perfect moderate energy level—he's happy to spend most of the day napping, but he also looks forward to his daily walks to stretch his legs and explore.


One of Oreo's favorite pastimes is soaking up the sunshine while sitting on the balcony. After a little fresh air, he's always ready to curl up for some cuddles. He's a very affectionate boy who absolutely loves being pet and getting attention from everyone he meets. he gets along with everyone!


While he doesn't currently have a kennel, Oreo is great at finding his own cozy little hideaway whenever he wants some quiet time to relax and recharge. He enjoys sitting in the bathroom or sitting under our desk, and sometimes joins in on our work calls.


Oreo is a smart pup who already knows commands like sit, stay, and shake & and he's always happy to show off his manners.


If you're looking for a loving, easygoing companion who enjoys sunshine, snuggles, leisurely walks, and being by your side, Oreo could be the perfect match. He's ready to bring lots of love, loyalty, and tail wags to his new family!

name: Aiden
description_html:
First time dog owner? This perfect fella is for you!


Aiden may be one of the easiest dogs at the shelter. On leash, fantastic! A living room setting, would love a nap or to lay quietly on the couch and munch on a toy. In a play yard, can play independently with toys but will come up for some cuddles as well!


Aiden recently went on an outing to McKinney Falls State Park. On the way there he sat in one spot in the back set holding a toy while looking out the window. He did fantastic on the 3 mile hike - was easy on leash and non-reactive. On the way back to the shelter this kid laid down and slept so hard that the volunteer drove around for a while then parked for about 30 minutes just to he could get a quiet nap for the first time in over 100 days.


Aiden was also used as a dog to train new volunteers recently. He showed off his "sit" and listening skills while occasionally asking for breaks by cuddling up to our new volunteers for some love.


As a 40-ish pound dog who is extremely house trained, he would be perfect in an apartment or a home!


Aiden is also heartworm negative.

name: Persephone
description_html: This is a feral momma kitty who I have been working on taming in foster with her babies. She's still likely to hiss if approached too quickly and be tightened up as hard as a rock when you touch her, but with some dedication I have gotten her to start relaxing during pets and even put her chin up and press into some neck and chin scritches. Definitely can't pick her up with your hands, but placing a blanket or towel over her makes her limp enough to handle and transport her. I believe she can be domesticated and put into a good home, but it will take continued work. Named Persephone because I got two kittens from her the year before these four kittens, so she was like Persephone coming back from the underworld every year bringing me new pretty babies. She has now been spayed to end that cycle!

name: Lando
description_html:
Lando has a soft face and an even softer personality. This gentle boy has a gentle charm that makes you want to hug him right away. 

 

Lando is a cuddly sweetheart who loves being close to his people. He enjoys squeaky toys and playtime in the yard, though fetch isn't really his thing. On walks he’s usually a loose-leash walker, with the occasional excitement to hurry and sniff something interesting. 

 

Lando can be a little timid with loud noises and appreciates slow, gentle introductions. Once he’s comfortable, his loving and playful side shines. 

 

If you're looking for a cuddly best friend with a playful streak, Lando is your guy!

name: Puma
description_html:
Puma will melt your heart with his crystal blue eye! He is a sweet pup whose bouncy gate will keep you smiling the entire walk. Very house trained and fabulous on a leash, he takes his cues from his guiding human and is definitely down for a cuddle session between activities.


Come meet this little house cow today

name: Princess
description_html:
🐾 Meet Princess!

Princess is a petite little lovebug with a big heart and an even bigger personality. She’s the perfect in-between size — not too big, not too small — just right for cuddles on the couch and adventures around the neighborhood.

This sweet girl is very house-trained and would make an easy addition to a home. Princess is also a wonderful doggie friend who absolutely loves being around her buddies. She gets so excited to see them and is always ready to share tail wags and good vibes.

On walks, Princess enjoys exploring but is also great about checking in often, making her a fun and connected walking companion. And when she’s got a little extra joy to share, she’ll treat you to her favorite activity: happy zoomies in the yard!

Princess has so much love to give and is patiently waiting for a family of her very own. She would be thrilled to trade shelter life for a cozy home, a comfy bed, and someone to call her best friend.

Come meet Princess — she’s ready to be your little ray of sunshine! 🐶💛

name: Teepee
description_html:
TeePee is a sweet, sensitive guy with a goofy streak and a whole lot of love to give. While he can be a little shy or nervous in new situations at first, he warms up beautifully with patience, treats, and gentle reassurance. Once he feels safe, TeePee’s affectionate and playful personality starts to shine through.


This handsome boy loves toys, enjoys walks, and is very treat motivated, which makes him both fun to spend time with and eager to learn. Volunteers describe him as a total sweetheart who loves giving kisses and can settle into a nice groove on walks once he gets his wiggles out. He’s also been enjoying enrichment activities like puzzle toys and has shown himself to be a smart, thoughtful pup who gains confidence over time.


TeePee has shown potential to live with another dog. He’s done well in playgroup with other soft, social dogs and may enjoy having a compatible canine friend in his future home. If you already have a resident dog, the shelter’s behavior team can help arrange a meet and greet to see if it’s a good fit!


TeePee would likely do best with adopters who understand that shy dogs sometimes need a little extra patience at first — but the reward is a deeply loving, loyal companion who will absolutely steal your heart.


Interested in meeting TeePee? Please reach out to his friends at orangedotcrew@gmail.com to learn more.

name: Muppet Baby
description_html:
Muppet will want to spend all in a yard. He loves being outside and chasing squirrels or lizards. Enjoys babypool on hot days. He will go in a crate but will need continued positive re-enforcement around it. Would not recommend for young kids due to energy level/mouthy playful behavior.


Muppet is a sweet baby who is learning all about the world. He is playful and hilarious. It’s impossible not to smile watching him play. He’s a young guy still learning so much and growing up at the shelter. Muppet will come with support from Orange dot crew to transition into a home!

name: Princess Peach
description_html: Meet Princess Peach! She really wants you because she loves new friends. This girl enjoys walks, play time and cuddling with her friends, and if you give her a toy to carry around it will truly make her day! Princess Peach is housetrained and crate trained. She is adorable, fun, easy to walk and ignores cats and dogs. She's ready to take on the world with a toy in her mouth and a friend by her side, so say "hello" to this girl today!

name: Latke
description_html:
Latke has a heart full of love and a smile that will light up any room. He loves his friends deeply and is always ready to cuddle up close or get a good belly rub. Latke runs with joy in a yard and enjoys hopping in a pool to cool off in the summer heat. He is also an A+ car passenger! Latke has shown us at the shelter that he can romp and play with a well matched dog buddy.

While Latke has a lot of love and joy deep inside, the stress of living in the shelter environment is taking its toll on both his body and his sensitive soul. Latke needs a lifeline - a soft place to land with someone who will show him what love and stability look like. Latke comes with the full support of the volunteer team Orange Dot Crew who are ready to help him succeed in his forever home. To learn more about Latke or schedule a time to meet this big lovable boy, reach out to orangedotcrew@gmail.com.

name: Pooh
description_html: Pooh is a happy, playful boy. He is housetrained, walks nicely on leash with a harness, and is dog friendly. Pooh loves to romp around the play yard tossing around toys and chasing balls. He also enjoys running along the fence line with other friendly dogs and has done well playing with others. . Pooh is sweet, affectionate and ready for his forever home. Come meet this handsome fellow!

name: Crosby
description_html:
Crosby is a handsome 2-year-old boy who is shy, curious, and playful!

Initially shy around people, Crosby will warm up to you with time, patience, and slow movements. Now that he’s been with his foster family for a few months, Crosby likes to be in the same room as them, he hangs out on the couch while they watch TV (he’s a fan of David Attenborough and dinosaurs), and he’s a champion cuddler at night. Before breakfast, Crosby winds around their ankles and makes the cutest, high-pitched meow to encourage them to put down his kibble bowl faster.

Crosby gets along well with other cats—male and female, older and younger. He makes friends quickly and will snuggle right up with them in a cat bed or human bed. He’s a polite player with other kitties and will work a puzzle board, bat toys around, or play chase with them. Although he enjoys these short playing sessions, he's also a lazy bones who is content to snooze the day away in a comfy spot.

Besides being a sweet cat buddy, Crosby has other good qualities: he scratches on scratching boards and posts, he always uses the litter box, and he’s a tidy kitty with the exception of some charming voracious eating habits.

Crosby is neutered, up-to-date on vaccinations, and ready to go home today!

I am a DHC, and I have my own webpage!

The adoption fee is waived for Crosby and ALL Desperate Housecats/Cactus Cats!

name: Legacy
description_html:
She’s all wrinkles and personality!✨


Introducing Legacy, a charismatic volunteer favorite looking for her forever.💕 One of her volunteer friends described her as “pure serotonin” in dog form.


Legacy has a joy that shines through even on the cloudiest days. Her playful spirit, adorable face wrinkles, and appreciation for the simple things (like romping through the tall grass) makes her a stand out.


She goes to doggy play group and has lived with a dog sibling before. 🐶She enjoys splashing in the pool and playing fetch. She’s also a smarty pants; She knows “sit” and is working on perfecting her “down.”


Legacy has a love for life that lights up for a room. She’s such a happy girl and seems so grateful for everything: hikes, car rides, treats, toys, swimming. She loves everything! She was such a joy to have over. Whoever adopts this sweet girl will be so lucky.


Interested in Legacy? Reach out to her friends at orangedotcrew@gmail.com for more info!

name: Oracle
description_html:
You can tell that Oracle is missing his person. :( 


Oracle lost his home after his owner’s house burned down, and now he is hoping for a fresh start with someone who will love him as much as his person did. He is a super house-trained boy who keeps his circle a little on the smaller side, but once you are in, you are in.


Oracle is sweet, silly, playful, and so much fun to spend time with. He loves his friends, loves treats, and already knows some cute tricks like sit, come, and shake. He has an playful side, but he is also the kind of dog who bonds deeply and loves being with his person.


He would do best with people who appreciate that he likes to keep his circle small and facilitates proper intros with new people. For the people he knows and trusts, Oracle is incredibly loving, fun, and rewarding. He is ready for a home where he can feel secure again and get back to doing what he does best- being a loyal, goofy, sweet companion.

name: Caleb
description_html:
Meet Caleb! 

Caleb is a sweet, happy guy with a great smile and a big love for fetch. He walks nicely on leash, is easy to take out, and once he’s handled his business he’s all about playtime—especially if there’s a ball involved!

He had a blast playing in the yard and enjoying toys in the Real Life Room, even showing off an adorable full sploot on the couch. Caleb loves fetch so much he prefers to keep the ball unless he spots another one ready to go—then the game is on again.

Playful, friendly, and easy to spend time with, Caleb is a wonderful buddy ready for a home that will keep the games coming.


He loves lounging on the couch with a squeaker toy. He may have a sensitive stomach so be stingy with treats. He has the cutest ear flops while walking!

name: Casius
description_html:
If you’re looking for a new source of joy in your life, meet Casius! This sleek, velvet-coated young pup is the definition of fun-loving and happy-go-lucky. With his big, floppy ears and an infectious, wide-mouthed smile, Casius brings an upbeat energy to every day.

He’s completely loves with playtime—whether he’s showing off his favorite toys or proudly pacing on his leash. Casius is always ready for his next great adventure, outdoor stroll, or game of fetch. Ready to add a loyal, playful best friend to your life? Casius is your guy!

name: Lil Baby Lou
description_html:
NOW HIRING: Full-Time Human Best Friend for Lil Baby Lou


Position Title: Human Companion, Couch Associate & Professional Snuggler


Salary: Unlimited love, daily laughs, and the privilege of sharing your couch with a 90-pound marshmallow.


About the Boss:

Meet Lil Baby Lou, an angelic gentleman weighing in at approximately 90 pounds of pure sweetness. While his size may suggest "linebacker," his personality is much more "oversized stuffed animal." Lou is essentially a giant marshmallow with legs—a soft-hearted cuddle expert who would happily list "snuggling" as both a hobby and a full-time career.


Job Responsibilities:

  • Provide couch space for evening cuddle sessions
  • Accept occasional use as a human pillow
  • Participate in leisurely car rides (Lou is an excellent passenger)
  • Receive affection from a dog who believes quality snuggle time is a critical life requirement
  • Allow Lou to demonstrate his advanced weighted blanket skills


Ideal Candidate Qualifications:

  • Enjoys sharing personal space with a very affectionate large dog
  • Appreciates quiet companionship and couch-based activities, with some daily walks or play time 
  • Can provide a pet-free workplace (Lou prefers to be your one and only furry friend) 


Professional References:

Lou comes highly recommended. Shelter volunteers absolutely adore him, and he recently completed a temporary foster placement with glowing reviews. During his foster stay, he proved himself to be:

  • Fully house trained
  • Polite and appropriate in the home
  • Able to stay in a crate when left alone at home
  • A respectful roommate who understood house manners


Housing Requirements:

Lou successfully lived in an apartment during foster care and handled apartment life like a pro. If apartment living is in the cards, having enough space to comfortably pass other dogs is important. Lou would prefer not to socialize with canine or feline coworkers and is seeking a position where he can be the sole recipient of your affection. He would also thrive in a home with a yard or daily walks! 


Employee Benefits Package:

  • Elite-level cuddle buddy services
  • Built-in emotional support
  • Heated weighted blanket functionality
  • Daily reminders that giant dogs have the gentlest hearts


To Apply:

If you've been searching for a best friend with the soul of a teddy bear, Lil Baby Lou would like to review your application immediately.

Please note: Acceptance of this position will result in a permanently occupied couch and a very full heart. To meet Lou, email his volunteer friends at orangedotcrew@gmail.com

name: Ramon
description_html:
Ramon is a golden-hearted pup who’s ready to be your new best friend! With his radiant cream-colored coat and a smile that lights up, Ramon is the perfect blend of athletic energy and gentle companionship.

Ramon has a playful spirit; he’s always up for toy time or a backyard romp. He is also a total gentleman when it’s time to hit the pavement; Ramon walks great on a leash, making every morning stroll a joy.

Above all, Ramon is defined by his sweet, affectionate nature. Whether he’s giving soft nudges for head scratches or wagging his tail in greeting, his goal is simple: to love and be loved. If you’re looking for a loyal, well-mannered partner for life’s adventures, Ramon is your guy!

name: Onyx
description_html:
✨ Meet Onyx ✨

Onyx is proof that amazing, trained dogs end up in shelters all the time.


She's already crate trained, potty trained, great in the car, CAT FRIENDLY, dog friendly, and has never met a stranger. She loves toys, cuddling up for movie nights, zoomies, and running through the sprinkler! She can shy at first then opens up to be so playful, silly and eager to please.


She's currently thriving in a foster home with a cat and it's obvious she's lived in a home before. She's the kind of dog who settles right into your life and immediately makes it better - she just needs someone willing to give her that chance.

If you're looking for your new best friend, Onyx is more than ready. ❤️

name: Cheddar
description_html:
Cheddar is a sweet and playful girl whose gentle demeanor will fill your heart with joy. Cheddar is also incredibly playful and affectionate, loving to snuggle up next to her humans for pets and belly rubs!

She is great in the car and will sit calmly for the whole ride, leaning her head on you for reassuring pets.

She has happily shared her kennel with other dog friends, but after meeting a cat at a volunteer’s house, she did not seem comfortable around them. Come meet this sweet pup at the shelter—you won’t regret making her part of your family.

name: Lady
description_html:
Lady is a sweet, affectionate, and goofy girl who absolutely adores people. She loves being part of whatever her humans are doing and quickly forms strong bonds with the people in her life. She has a playful side too... tug, shaking toys, and zooming around the yard are some of her favorite activities. She’s also a smart pup who enjoys learning and staying busy with enrichment games like puzzle toys, scent games, and sniffy walks.


Lady is also a sensitive dog who is still building confidence with a couple things. She can feel unsure around other dogs and would likely do best as the only pet in the home. She prefers not to be left alone for long periods and is currently working on learning that being home alone is safe and relaxing. With patience, routine, and continued training, she’s sure to make steady progress.


What Lady does best is loving her people. She thrives with human connection and would be happiest in a home where she can spend lots of time with her person and continue building confidence at her own pace.


If you’re looking for a devoted companion who will bond closely with you and bring lots of personality into your life, Lady might be the perfect match.

name: Mama Eden
description_html:
Mama is an affectionate, high energy girl who wants to soak up all life has to offer. Her favorite things are walks, hikes, playing with her foster brother, and snuggling up for long naps. She has the cutest, most expressive eyes that will truly convey all the love she has for her people. 



Extra info: She would do best in a home with an active lifestyle. She requires A LOT of walks and/or play. She’s a big love bug that is still learning her size, so I don’t think a home with small children would be a good fit.

name: Angel
description_html:
~ Ears Up!

Angel is a sweet, easygoing girl who's turning a new page after her beloved owner who went into hospice. She's a total sweetheart who gets along with everyone and is super low-maintenance. Angel loves playing with her ball and pretending to lightly hide it outdoors, sunbathing indoors and outdoors, and going for sniff walks. She's perfectly content to relax inside and watch the world go by from a window view. She's house-trained, trustworthy, independent, and doesn't bother the local wildlife. If you're looking for a loving companion who will bring joy and peace to your life, without bringing a lot of new chores and routines, Angel is your girl!

Reach out on her link or contact her advocates at caring@classiccanines.org

name: Ginger
description_html:
Ginger is a smart, curious pup. She is super focused on you or cheese or that sound coming from over there. She's housetrained and treat-motivated, making her training a joy, knowing basic commands like "sit." She's a great passenger in the car, and easy around the house, happy to gaze out the window or just be close to her humans.

Ginger enjoys exploring, hiking, a good sniff, and puzzle games with treats involved. She'll also do zoomies and is soooo happy to run around the yard and stretch her legs. She loves her humans and gives the most gentle, sweet little kisses.

She's really fun and full of energy. Come meet her today!

name: Boski
description_html: Boski is a graduate of our Enduring Service program! To learn more about this program, read about it on our website. Boski is a very intelligent, loving, and playful dog that sometimes believes he's still a tiny pup. He lives to chase balls, play with chew toys, and go to play group with other dogs. Boski also loves to chill out and cuddle when playtime is over. He knows many basic commands like sit, pay, down, stay, and "with me" (heel). Boski isn't one to pass up a good nap. He's kennel trained and can sometimes be slow to come out of the kennel if he's having a solid snooze. Other times, he's ready to exit and will give you a bear hug. Boski is harness trained and easy on leash after initial zoomies. He's a big boy who loves his people and dog friends! He'd be a great dog in many home situations. Boski is very dog friendly, but we recommend scheduling a meet and greet before fostering or adopting if you have another dog at home.

name: Chiquis
description_html:
If you’re looking for a dog who can make you laugh every single day, meet Chiquis — a tiny powerhouse with a HUGE zest for life. Volunteers describe her as a “busy lady” who would rather zoom, hop, and play than sit still for a photo. She loves toys, loves movement, and loves turning the play yard into her personal racetrack.


Chiquis has classic puppy-style enthusiasm: she can be a little jumpy when excited, but she responds well to redirection and absolutely thrives when given something fun to do. She’s sweet, playful, and people-oriented, and once she burns off a little energy, her softer side starts peeking through.


Because she’s new to the shelter, we’re still learning all her quirks — but what we know so far is that she’s spirited, silly, and ready for an adopter who appreciates a high-energy, toy-driven companion.


Chiquis would love a home with:

✔ Playtime, toys, and activities

✔ Positive training to help channel her enthusiasm

✔ Someone who appreciates an energetic, goofy pup


If you’re searching for a pocket-sized adventure buddy who brings joy everywhere she goes, come meet Chiquis — she’s ready to run right into her new life.

Interested in Chiquis? Reach out to blueplusbusters@gmail.com for more info!

name: Ink
description_html: Ink is a happy-go-lucky guy who’s always up for whatever adventure you have in mind - especially if it involves toys! Ink LOVES a toy and will get so excited he will jog around with it happily, plop in your lap to show you, and then jog around with it again. Despite his enthusiasm, Ink is surprisingly easy to handle — volunteers found him simple to harness and eager to head out for fun. Once in the play yard, Ink is in his element: zooming around, chasing toys, and soaking up every moment. Outside the play yard, Ink is also a great jogging buddy in the making and happily kept pace on a short jog with one of his volunteer friends. He knows sit, likes treats, and is a smart boy who will be easy to train and be up for any adventure with his new people!

name: Ash
description_html:
Hi there! I’m Ash, a bundle of joy packed with curiosity and energy.


Every day is a new adventure for me, and I love exploring every nook and cranny of my surroundings. I’m also quite the brainy pup, always eager to learn new tricks and solve puzzles. My friends here say

I’m sweet and always sporting a smile, which makes every day brighter. I dream of a home where I can share all this love and excitement. I'm also house trained!


He is such a loving, gentle boy. He is great with other dogs, house-trained, and sweet. He is medium-energy. Does well with walks or having a yard to play in. He loves stuffy toys and taking a dip in the kiddie pool.


If you’re looking for a loyal friend to add zest to your life, I’m your guy!


Interested in Ash? Reach out to his friends at orangedotcrew@gmail.com for more info!

name: Mojo
description_html:
Meet Mojo — the ultimate cuddle bug with a heart of gold

Mojo’s love languages are absolutely physical touch and quality time. He’ll accept gifts if you insist, but what he truly wants is to be as close to his human as possible. From the moment you meet him, his gentle, affectionate nature shines. This boy is all about closeness, connection, and soaking up every bit of love he can get.


Mojo is a dream on leash, checks in often with his walker, and already knows cues like sit and shake. He’s polite, well-mannered, and radiates “I want to be your best friend” energy. He also keeps his kennel impressively tidy, suggesting he may be house trained. Passing people and dogs? No problem for this calm, steady guy—he simply minds his manners and keeps moving.


If you’re looking for an affectionate, easygoing companion who loves deeply and loyally, Mojo is your match. Come see why everyone falls for this handsome lovebug.

name: Marcelle
description_html:
Marcelle is an active, independent guy who will happily entertain himself with his favorite toys. He loves to run and play and is always ready for a dip in the pool to cool off. Marcelle also enjoys playing with a well matched dog friend!


When it comes to human friends, Marcelle is a sensitive soul and might be a bit shy at first; he just needs a little time to become confident that you’re a friend. But once he does, you’ll have a really special bond with this guy. Marcelle’s ultimate person would be someone who enjoys an active lifestyle, appreciates an independent guy, and is willing to go at his pace as they build their forever bond. 


Interested in Marcelle? Reach out to orangedotcrew@gmail.com for more info!

name: Candy Corn
description_html:
